placements.overview:
Sumatibhai Shah Ayurved Mahavidyalaya is a private institute and is located in Pune, Maharashtra. Sumatibhai Shah Ayurved Mahavidyalaya courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute is approved by CCIM and offers courses in Full Time mode. Sumatibhai Shah Ayurved Mahavidyalaya offers a total of 3 courses in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are MD, B.A.M.S. and PG Diploma and the total seat intake for the available courses is 98. These courses are offered to students across several specialisation such as Ayurved. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 1,88,000 to 7,16,274 and the average median salary is around INR 3,00,000. Apart from this, the Sumatibhai Shah Ayurved Mahavidyalaya campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Sumatibhai Shah Ayurved Mahavidyalaya offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.A.M.S. Whereas, at PG level, Sumatibhai Shah Ayurved Mahavidyalaya offers courses such as MD and PG Diploma. Sumatibhai Shah Ayurved Mahavidyalaya fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,88,000 to 7,16,274.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Teachers are knowledgeable and helpful, staff and management is poor, canteen is poor.

review_content.Placements: Many of the seniors had got placed in various hospitals and clinics nearby. After B.A. MS, the lowest package is 30,000 per month and the highest varies. We have our own hospital, so a 6-month internship is provided in our hospital, and the next 6 months of internship are done at any other government hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college building is well-maintained but not satisfactory. They have free Wi-Fi, but due to more than 300 students, it didn’t work. Classrooms are good, but the tables are not very comfortable. We have a projector, which is also good but needs to be turned off the curtains to get more visibility. There is a girls' hostel, but there is no boys' hostel. The canteen is available, but food and hygiene are not proper.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Best college for learning Ayurveda.

review_content.Placements: I am currently a final year UG student and will complete my internship in 2026. This college is the best one for medical exposure of the students due to the high flow of patients in the hospital. The doctor graduates from here hold good positions and salaries outside. You can also pursue MD Ayurveda in this college. It is the best college to learn skills and gain experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is equipped with good infrastructure. Modern projector based learning model is also adapted here. Professors are quite helpful and hold great knowledge and experience in their subjects. Separate hostels for both boys and girls are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sumatibhai Shah Ayurved Mahavidyalaya.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students placed in our college have good scores. Lower package offered ranges from 5 LPA to some graduates earning 20 LPA with their own medical practice. All the students get compulsory internship of 1 year after completing graduation.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is well with good buildings and other amenities and free Wi-Fi labs and library with lots of books and e-library. The canteen is average and needs to be remodeled, and games are played in the ground which is near the college pharmacy.

review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities is good and also supportive Hostel mess is actually good than other mess that I have seen. Good quality lecture are provided by the faculty members. Dissection classes are provided by college. Canteen is available in campus Sports and games are arranged .

content.Placements: Placement assistants send the eligible students for recruitment. Such assistants check the information of the students once to twice before the drives. The highest and moderate package offered to the student would be 21.3 LPA and 2.98 LPA.

content.Placements: Basically, students got hired in various positions of HR consulting firms in companies like Aon Hewitt, Mercer, Accenture, with the best pay of 1.960,000, which made most of the students wonder about it. We are not worried about reaching out to companies by ourselves because all top companies participate in recruitment.
content.Faculty: Teachers are supportive from the admission process to course completion. They give more importance to the low-grade students, and they give advice to them often. Usually, they handle practical classes rather than explaining the theoretical concepts. Teachers are offered good pay.

content.Placements: College is best in class for providing placement support and guidance. There is a separate isolated cell for placements. college_info.intro:
The Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science Chennai is known for its range of courses in the Engineering, Management, Humanities and Arts, Law, etc. streams. Among these courses the BTech and MBA at HIT Chennai stand out as the flagship programmes of the university.
These courses are highly sought-after among students for their placements and career opportunities with HITS BTech graduates able to take on a range of technical roles, all the while BTech students can also choose from among a range of specialisations including CSE, ECE, Mechanical Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc.
While students of the HITS MBA programme are trained for less technical roles with an emphasis on Management and Leadership positions. Graduates will find a skill-set and foundation tailor made for the industry and job market with the university having a strong placement rate of 93.94% during recent years.
Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. HITS Chennai courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Hindustan Institute of Technology & Science Chennai Tamil Nadu in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility criteria defines the required educational qualifications for a candidate to become eligible for admission. admission_process.title: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: HITS admission is mainly based on the university’s in-house entrance exam, i.e., HITSEEE & HITSCAT.Hindustan Universityconducts HITSEEE to provide admission to BTech courses. HITSCAT is the new entrance test conducted by the institute for admission to BDes, Law, Management, and some other courses. Additionally, some national entrance exams are also accepted for admission. These include UGC NET, CLAT, and GATE. Apart from this, the university also has a Centre for Open and Digital Education where six courses are taught online including both UG and PG level courses. Hindustan University courses offered include UG, PG, Doctoral, and Integrated courses in popular streams. These are BCom, BBA, BCA, MA, MBA, and MCA.

The institute offers more than 11 courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through the official website. Candidates can read the table below to learn more on Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science admission highlights 2025:
Particulars
HITS Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes offered
11 courses across various specialisations
How to apply?
https://hindustanuniv.ac.in/
Application Status
Level of programmes offered

HITS offers a diverse range of undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and integrated programs in popular fields. Thes include courses from Science, Engineering, Management, Humanities, and Medicine. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularHindustan Institute of Technology and Science courses:
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
Graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate
Graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science (HITS) has a multi-step admission process that students need to follow to get into the university. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the entrance exam followed by selection rounds and lastly confirmation of admission. After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university. Interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Additionally, Admission to all the programmes is based on the entrance exam. Check below the complete HITS admission process:
1 - HITS Application 2025
The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.
2 - HITS Admission Selection rounds
Appear for the university-based entrance exam i.e., HITSEEE & HITSCAT. The selection will be based on entrance exam score and GDPI and then wait for the release of their merit list.
3 - HITS Document Verification
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered at Hindustan University placements?
faqs.answer: The Hindustan University average package offered to BTech and BArch students during Hindustan University placements 2024 stood at INR 4.60 LPA and INR 4.50 LPA, respectively. The following table showcases the Hindustan University packages offered in 2024 placement drive: Course Average Package (2024) BTech INR 4.6 LPA MTech INR 4.5 LPA MBA INR 4.5 LPA BArch INR 4.5 LPA Note: The above-mentioned packages are taken from the official website. These are assumed as average packages as only salary was mentioned on the official website.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for MBA at HITS Chennai?
faqs.answer: The total fee for HITS Chennai MBA courses is cumulative of multiple components, such as security deposit, tuition fee, hostel fee, and more. Selected candidates have to pay admission fee amount after selection for seat confirmation. Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science MBA tuition fee range from INR 1.2 Lacs to INR 4.3 lakh . Additionally, the one-time fee is INR 8,500 and the hostel charges range from INR 1.48 Lacs to INR 1.64 lakh . It must be noted that the mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the fee for LLB at Hindustan University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for LLB courses at Hindustan University is INR 5 lakh. Candidates also have to pay tutition fee and hostel fee. Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

HITS ERP has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2024.

hostel.description:
The hostels have well-furnished air-conditioned and regular rooms with attached restrooms providing the right ambience for the students. There are five residential halls for boys and three for girls on campus
that accommodate over 2500 students. State of the art kitchen and spacious dining area has been provided for both the hostels and a customized menu caters to the student’s needs. Hygiene and cleanliness is emphasized in the hostel. All the hostels offer a variety of services and opportunities for students. Staff members residing in the hostel are assigned to address academic and personal problems of the students. Round-the-clock security, communication, dispensary facilities are also available.

library.description: The HITS' Library has a collection of 105253 books, 42262 online journals and 389 printed journals, 12 newspaper, 64 thesis and dissertations, 3031 project reports and 2792 CDs. The Library system consists of a Central Library and Departmental Libraries which collectively support the teaching, research and extension programmes of the Institute. All students, faculty members and employees of the Institute are entitled to use the Library facilities enrolling membership.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Horse Riding, Cycling, Boxing, Karate, Volleyball Court, Throwball, Athletics, Aerobics, Martial Arts, Table Tennis, Billiards and Snooker

The ‘Garage Café’ is another food court with a rugged garage appearance catering to the needs of the food lovers. Both continental and Indian cuisines are served. Besides, fast food and other eateries are also available.

reviews.review_heading: MBA in Business Analytics.
reviews.review_text: A lot of controversies happened in the college, especially during the inter college cultural which severely disrupted the pace of the whole college. Providing permission for conducting such events often in the college causes the students to lower their concentration on academics and placement wise. Apart from all the beautiful campus it looks like the best facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the campus infrastructure, and they conduct many events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science is awesome and full of greenish environment. It gives a peaceful mind for the students to concentrate on their studies. Labs with well quality equipments, and they give importance to studies as well as sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: College should always be proud of their student's achievements. College is so good by the means of transportation facilities. They also collect very minimal charges for every student for transportation. Apart from grading systems, college looks for well-disciplined students.

reviews.review_heading: A detailed insight of my college placements, infrastructure, teachers, curriculum, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent and green. The drainage systems are well maintained, and in rainy seasons there won't be much clogged water. There are different architectural buildings for different departments. Library is well-maintained and air-conditioned. There are football field, basketball court, badminton court, etc. There are 2 canteens and a mini super-market is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed insights into my college placements, infrastructure, faculty, curriculum, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent and green. The drainage systems are well maintained, and in rainy seasons there won't be much clogged water. There are different architectural buildings for different departments. The library is well-maintained and air-conditioned. There are football field, basketball court, badminton court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by the college and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are clean and hygienic and have all the equipment required for the particular course. When it comes to me, I study computer Science (AI&this), labs are very good, with good signal strength, and proper systems for coding. Being a day scholar I'm unaware of the hostel but my friends living in hostel tells that the rooms are great, good needs to be improved.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: The food is good in the hostel and also there are clinic in our college for medical emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: The start of my twenties in the best place HITS.
reviews.review_text: HITS has good infrastructure where it is peaceful and quiet in common with more trees. Also, the hostels are well-equipped with basic need amenities. The quality of the food is also very hygienic and clean. At last, the best part is the library which is very large and peaceful to our work.

reviews.review_heading: Need improvements in placements, classrooms, and upgradation in syllabus.
reviews.review_text:
Library is so good and classroom's AC won't work. No Wi-Fi is available.
The quality of the food is so good and they are well-focused on sports and events and if you like extra activities you can choose this college it well suits you but for knowledge, it's not the right one for the future.

reviews.review_heading: A proper college to gain knowledge in aeronautics and aerospace for a career.
reviews.review_text: The college has good architecture and infrastructure design. Students have various hangout spots to relax. The college has good hostel facilities, including AC and non-AC, providing hygienic food for North Indian and South Indian students. Good medical facilities are also provided in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Life at HITS - Can survive and excel when you have an interest to be motivated and ask doubts.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are okay in Hindustan. Library is very good and well-maintained. It has 5 floors and air-conditioned. I didn't opt for hostel but still some of my friends said it was average. There is 1 main canteen and some small snacks and ice-cream shops are available.

reviews.review_heading: Life in Hindustan, everything u need to know from an hindustaninan.
reviews.review_text: So facilities are good in Hindustan like we have so many labs like aerodynamics lab, propulsion system lab and computer labs and only hostellers are provided with Wi-Fi and in hostels even though the fee is a bit high it is good and the food is good too .

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the curriculum but need more placements in relevant fields.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities were good. It contained aircraft hanger, fight simulator, chetak helicopter, learjet aircraft, wind tunnels, etc. Different varieties of hostels were provided based on our requirements and comfort. Sports and games were available too. We could go for horse riding as well.

reviews.review_heading: I am a little dissatisfied because of placement and, moreover, good infrastructure and faculties.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and peaceful environment. Students are friendly, and good laboratory facilities are available. Many play areas are available for students. They give space for sports too. Good and neat environment. Good food and hostel feel good because of caring and cleanliness.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a good campus and worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science (HITS) provides excellent infrastructure with Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a comprehensive library. Hostels offer modern amenities and 24/7 medical services. The campus has a hygienic mess, a canteen, and sports facilities for various outdoor and indoor games.

college_info.college_name: HITS Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science offers both need-based and merit-based scholarships to the eligible students. Also, Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science has instituted Hindustan Teaching Research Fellowships (HTRF) for eligible candidates.
Below are the major highlights of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science scholarships:

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science provides a total of 7 scholarships to eligible students. Below mentioned are the detailed information regarding Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science scholarships:
DRDO Scholarship Scheme for Girls

This scholarship is for Girls / Women students studying in first year of Under Graduate (BE/B.TECH: full time four year degree) and Post Graduate (M.TECH/ME: two year full time degree course) under “DRDO Scholarship Scheme for Girls in Aerospace Engg / Aeronautical Engg / Space Engg & Rocketry / Avionics / Aircraft Engg”.
Covid Martyrs Scholarships

This scholarship is for wards of COVID Martyrs, who have lost their lives protecting our countrymen during the COVID Pandemic will be given complete Tuition Fee waiver in the discipline of their choice, having met the basic laid down norms, such as marks in qualifying exams etc. Also all the expenses of the student which include traveling, boarding and lodging will be taken care of by HITS. Also, a monthly stipend is provided during the period of the course.
Covid Frontline Warrior Scholarship

This scholarship is for the wards of Doctors, Healthcare professionals, Government and Service personnel those who have participated in protecting our countrymen during the COVID Pandemic. The scholarship is for a period of two years across all courses to those who meet the basic scholarship criteria.
Dr KCG Verghese Merit Cum Means Scholarship

This scholarship is offered to the top scorers in Class 12 from any School, Boards, Subjects, Centum Scorers, Class Toppers at HITS, Batch Toppers, and UG Rank Holders and Proficiency Prize holders are awarded scholarship to pursue their higher studies at HITS. Scholarships are also awarded to the meritorious students who are financially weak to meet their educational needs at HITS.
Dr Elizabeth Verghese Founder Chancellor Scholarship

This scholarship is offered to the girls with academic potential to pursue higher education and who are from lower income families and are interested in pursuing higher education at HITS are eligible for this scholarship.
Hindusthan Loyality Scholarship
This scholarship is subject to norms and the scrutiny of the Scholarship Committee. It is offered to:
Sports Scholarship

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science offers this scholarship to the students who excel in sports. The student who has performed and achieved at the National, State and Inter-University Levels in the following sports are eligible.

review_summary.college_name: ITM SLS Baroda University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is really good. Exams and campus life are also good.

content.Placements: On the first day of my college, I saw many students in different courses. I am studying BCA from ITM. This year, they have started one summer internship of 1 month and another in the final year which we have to do internships in the last semester. In education, they support us a lot. I just now finished my summer internship and we are asked to find internships on our own.
content.Infrastructure: I lived in the city only so I never stayed in the hostel. The food is amazing and the mess food is really very good. The canteen is average. Classrooms are big. The college also has a library and one has to issue a library card. We can avail books and notes from it. Labs of the college are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: We have good infrastructure. Event is very good. Bus facility is available, hostel rooms are good.

content.Placements: Students are not placed yet as we are the 2nd batch, and 1st batch is in 3rd year. Our course is 4.5 years. As I told you, seniors are the 1st batch, they are in the 3rd year now. In our university, the highest package is 13.5 LPA for batch students. We have a compulsory internship for 6 months.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good at the college. I am in the physiotherapy department. We don't have Wi-Fi connection in class but on campus we have Wi-Fi. In hostel also every floor has Wi-Fi. About canteen, we have two canteens, one is Gajibo and 2nd is Tea Post. Mess is different for hosteller. Games are available at any time. We have a hospital on campus.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are pretty good compared to others. The ROI (Return on Investment) is very good in our college compared to other colleges. A lot of students get internships from our course, around 45 to 50, in companies like Google, Boast, Lenskart, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are very neat. Classrooms are very perfect. There is no noise pollution. Wi-Fi was a problem before, but it has been cleared. The library is very huge. Every book is available and easy to access. The library is also clean.

admission_overview.college_name: ITM SLS Baroda University Admission 2026: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: ITM SLS Baroda University Admission process 2026

paragraphs: ITM SLS Baroda University admission 2026is currently open. ITM (SLS) Baroda offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institute also offers diploma courses. To get admission toITM SLS Baroda University, meet the eligibility criteria of the preferred course. The university offers more than 10 courses in various streams such as Design, Engineering, Mass Communication & Media, etc. The application process at ITM SLS Baroda University is conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutITM SLS Baroda Universitycourse admission2026.

ITM SLS Baroda University courses' admissions are based on the entrance exam and merit basis. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular ITM SLS Baroda University courses:
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreITM SLS Baroda University courses

ITM SLS Baroda University has a multi-step admission process that students need to follow to get into ITM SLS Baroda University. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the course-specific entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university post where interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Additionally, Admission to all the ITM SLS Baroda University programmes is based on merit and entrance exam. Candidates must check the eligibility criteria on the official website of ITM SLS Baroda University, before filling out the admission form. Interested candidates can check below the complete ITM SLS Baroda University admission process:
Step 1: ITM SLS Baroda University Application Process
The mode of ITM SLS Baroda University application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill the online application form.
Step 2: ITM SLS Baroda University Selection rounds
ITM SLS Baroda University shortlists candidates either based on merit or entrance exam. After shortlisting candidates, selected candidates receive a provisional admission letter.
Step 3: Final Admission confirmation
To confirm admission at ITM SLS Baroda University, selected candidates need to pay theITM SLS Baroda University feeand visit the university campus for the document verification process.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at ITM SLS Baroda University?
faqs.answer: ITM SLS Baroda University offers 32 courses at UG, PG and Diploma levels in multiple streams like Management, Engineering, Computer Applications, etc. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for UG courses. Bachelor's degree is required to apply for any of the ITM University PG course. Admission is both merit and entrance-based.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA course at ITM SLS Baroda University?
faqs.answer: Admission to MBA is based on CAT/ CMAT score. Additionally, candidates must hold bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ SEBC/ EWS) to apply for MBA course. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The total fee for MBA is INR 1.80 lakh.

faqs.question: Is studying at ITM (SLS) Baroda University expensive?
faqs.answer: The fee structure is different for various courses at ITM SLS Baroda University. Students can check the course-wise total tuition fee from the table presented below:Course NameTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 3.9 lakhBBAINR 2.6 lakhMBAINR 1.9 lakh-INR 2.6 lakhBCAINR 1.9 lakhBPharmaINR 4 lakhBScINR 1.6 lakh-INR 3.6 lakhNote:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Can I apply for BBA (Hons) at ITM SLS Baroda University after Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who have completed Class 12 or equivalent exam from any recognised central/ state board or school can apply for BBA (Hons) course. Additionally, the university will shortlist candidates for BBA (Hons) based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The total fee for BBA (Hons) is INR 2.6 lakh.

placement_data.title: ITM SLS Baroda University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to the official data released by the University, the highest package offered during ITM SLS Baroda University placements 2024 stood at INR 43 LPA . Further, the average package offered in 2024 was INR 4 LPA . More than 900 companies visited the campus and 90% of the total students were placed during ITM SLS Baroda University placements 2024.

There is a dedicated team of Training and Placement Cell at ITMBU responsible for suitably placing students according to their Aptitude, Scores, Attendance, Caliber & Competence. To enhance employability, the cell offers: Aptitude/Technical Tests, Internships, Career Tracks, Mock Interviews, and a Placement Office.

faqs.answer: A:    Bihar College of Pharmacy offers Degree and Diploma courses including 2 UG and 1 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Bihar College of Pharmacy has specializations such as M.Pharma specializations in Pharmaceutical.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty but dissatisfied with facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 90% students were placed in our course with average package of 6 Lacs/annum which can go upto 16 Lacs/annum. Tp recruiting companies are Alkem, glasco and sun pharma. They even hire for internships about 80% of students. The most important thing is that this college has 100% employment record.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college has a great infrastructure as it provides free Wi-Fi, weekly labs, 24*7 library facility, etc. Hostel facility is good with hygienic food in the mess and the canteen. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best private pharmacy college in the state of Bihar.

review_content.Placements: Our batch is the 2019 batch of B.Pharma. The placement cell of our college provides students with the opportunity to practice in India as well as abroad. Many pharmaceuticals companies and hospitals like Mankind, Dr Reddy, Apollo, etc., come to our college for placements. The cell organises seminars, workshops and webinars to sharpen the skills and attitude of students, which ultimately leads to better selection opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is decent and at par with the level of other pharmacy colleges of the country. The campus has a Wi-Fi facility. college_info.college_name: SGSITS Indore: Courses, Fees, Admissions 2026, Scholarships, Placements

highlights.summary: Shri GS Institute of Technology & Science Indore admissions 2026 are about to open soon. All the latest updates regarding SGSITS are as follows:

table.details: Rajiv Gandhi Prodyogiki Vishwavidyalaya and Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Indore (formerly)

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at SGSITS are BTech, MBA and MCA. SGSITS Indore offers BTech across various specialisations such as Bio-Medical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Instrumentation Engineering, Information Technology, etc. The Institute extends these popular programmes with a duration of 2-4 years. The eligibility for the same is merit-based along with entrance exams such as JEE Main, CMAT, MPPET, GATE, GPAT etc.
While the MBA course is offered across specialisations, including Applied Physics & Optoelectronics, Biomedical Engineering, Civil Engineering and Applied Mechanics, Computer Engineering & Electrical Engineering, etc. The SGSITS Indore fee structure for BTech being around INR 4 Lakhs to INR 5.12 Lakhs depending on the specialisation while the SGSITS Indore MCA fees is around INR 1,25,550. Interested students can check the popular programmes offered at SGSITS Indore in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
The SGSITS Indore cutoff is out for admission to BTech and other courses through JEE Mains. The SGSITS cutoff for BTech in Computer Science and Engineering stood as the most competitive with the first and last round closing ranks being 21533 and 39483, respectively. While the most relaxed specialisation was BTech in Industrial and Production Engineering with 58539 and 152178 being the first and last round closing ranks, respectively.

Generally the SGSITS Indore cutoff varied between 39483 and 193204. Interested candidates can check the SGSITS JEE Main cutoff 2025 in the table provided below:

SGSITS College Indore also features online courses by NPTEL that have been approved by the AICTE and are hosted by reputable institutes and universities in India.

faqs.answer: A:    The SGSITS accepts the JEE Main entrance exam, followed by a counselling round for admission to its BTech and BTech Integrated courses. As per Round 1 of the JEE Main 2025 cutoff, the closing rank for the General AI category candidates stood between is between 21533 and 58539. So, if a candidate wants to secure a seat at SGSITS, they should target securing a rank up to 58539 to improve their chances of getting a call from SGSITS for admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the SGSITS cutoff 2025 for General AI quota: JEE Main Round 1 Closing Rank (General-All India)Course2025B.Tech. in Civil Engineering54761B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering35170B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering41294B.Tech. in Information Technology26568B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering47041B.Tech. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering39962B.Tech. in Industrial and Production Engineering58539B.Tech. in Bio Medical Engineering44024B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering21533

faqs.answer: A:    Program for Self-Finance: SGSITS provides just one MBA programme for self-finance.Year-for-year Breakdown: The two-year fees are split into four semesters. The first semester requires the largest initial payment, which comes to about Rs.66,140 and includes tuition, incidental, development, and other costs.Remaining Semesters: The fees for the remaining semesters will be Rs.59,375 to Rs.59,540, which is a slight reduction. Extra Costs: In addition to tuition, take into account mess, exam, library, and activity costs. Hostels may also be necessary. Scholarship Opportunities: Merit and other factors determine eligibility for a limited number of scholarships. Official Resources: Visit the SGSITS website or download the most recent booklet on the MBA programme to get the most up-to-date and comprehensive information on the cost schedule.

The institute also offers a 5% relaxation in the aggregate for SC/ST/OBC category candidates. Students willing to take admission must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of the admission confirmation stage.

The highest package is approximately 25 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA and the average package is 7 LPA. Top companies are Larsen and Turbo, L&T, Tata Projects, kalpataru etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has good facilities, it has a large cricket ground. Good basketball court, volleyball court, badminton court, lawn tennis court. The college has a vast collection of books in the library. Students get a monthly magazine and daily English and Hindi newspapers.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College is better for the students in Madhya Pradesh than other private or government colleges.

review_content.Placements: Good for a state engineering college. Placement rates vary by branch and batch but are typically strong for CSE/IT and improving for core branches. IT services and product companies TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, some product firms and startups, regional manufacturing and engineering firms. In recent years, Tier-1 Indian product startups and mid-sized firms have participated. The average package is around 12 to 13 LPA for CS and IT, and the highest is 24 LPA by Goldman Sachs on campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus of the institute has amenities like a Co operative store, Dispensary, Bank, Canteen, Staff Quarters, Hostels, Gymnasium, Sports Complex, etc. Very soon, there will be a post office inside the campus. The Golden Jubilee Auditorium of the institute has a seating capacity of 275 people. The canteen of the college serves food and beverages to students, staff and faculty members.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members here are very interactive and supportive.

review_content.Placements: For specifically CS, IT, and ECE, the placements here are pretty good, and for core branches like ME, CE, EE, and EI, they are not up to the mark, it was around an average of 5 LPA to 6 LPA. There are other branches like IPE and BME, particularly BME and IPE, where the average salary offered is 3 LPA to 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: SGSITS hostels offer decent, sometimes basic, accommodations. However, hostels here are expensive but have good amenities. Food quality is mixed (average to poor in general, better in newer messes), medical care involves a dispensary, and sports facilities include grounds and indoor games, though reviews suggest food/facilities vary, with many nearby cafes offering better food options than the canteen.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at SGSITS Indore?
overview_faqs.answer: Program for Self-Finance: SGSITS provides just one MBA programme for self-finance.Year-for-year Breakdown: The two-year fees are split into four semesters. The first semester requires the largest initial payment, which comes to about Rs.66,140 and includes tuition, incidental, development, and other costs.Remaining Semesters: The fees for the remaining semesters will be Rs.59,375 to Rs.59,540, which is a slight reduction. Extra Costs: In addition to tuition, take into account mess, exam, library, and activity costs. Hostels may also be necessary. Scholarship Opportunities: Merit and other factors determine eligibility for a limited number of scholarships. Official Resources: Visit the SGSITS website or download the most recent booklet on the MBA programme to get the most up-to-date and comprehensive information on the cost schedule.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider SGSITS Indore as a good institute?
overview_faqs.answer: SGSITS Indore is worth being considered as a good institute as it owns recognitions and accreditations of various national governing bodies. Apart from this, SGSITS Indore has BTech as its flagship course which ranks under the rank-band of 201-300, withing the Engineering category of NIRF 2024. The Institute offers merit and means-based admission along with various scholarships to benefit from. Therefore, it can be concluded that SGSITS Indore is a good institute.

review_summary.college_name: SGSITS Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The facilities and placements are decent, but the fees are a bit high.

content.Placements: Currently, I am in the 1st year of the SGSITS Indore Electrical Engineering branch. Approximately 60% of the total students were placed in core and technical sectors. The highest package was 19 LPA offered by ORACLE Inc. in a technical role. The average was 7.5 LPA. The lowest package was 3.5 LPA offered by TCS. The top recruiters include Havells, Oracle, Deloitte, and TCS. The top roles were in core and technical sectors.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by the college are decent, but the fees being charged for them are a bit too high. The classrooms and labs are equipped with all the required instruments. The library is good, and a lot of books are available here that are needed for every course. The food is decent, but again, the fees are very high. The total fees for a semester are 48,000 rupees. The sports facilities are not that good, but you can play almost all the casual games. The gymkhana is good and is equipped with all the workout equipment, and the charges are 400 rupees per month.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are supportive, and have a good placement record compared to others in Madhya Pradesh.

content.Placements: Around 80% students' placement data of CSE, IT, ECE and around 50-60% for other branches. The highest package goes around 25 LPA, and the lowest around 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Mastercard, Goldman Sachs, Oracle, etc. Almost all students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: You will get all basic facilities, including a library, all sports facilities, well-equipped classrooms and Wi-Fi facility with a computer lab. Medical facilities are also available, and hostel and mess food are average. If you do not want the college hostel, there are many PG flats available in nearby areas.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is good, but students are not satisfied due to the increase in fees.

content.Placements: 80 to 85 percent students get placed other go for higher studies and some go for government exam preparation. The highest package is approximately 25 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA and the average package is 7 LPA. Top companies are Larsen and Turbo, L&T, Tata Projects, kalpataru etc.
content.Infrastructure: College has good facilities, it has a large cricket ground. Good basketball court, volleyball court, badminton court, lawn tennis court. The college has a vast collection of books in the library. Students get a monthly magazine and daily English and Hindi newspapers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is better for the students in Madhya Pradesh than other private or government colleges.

content.Placements: Good for a state engineering college. Placement rates vary by branch and batch but are typically strong for CSE/IT and improving for core branches. IT services and product companies TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, some product firms and startups, regional manufacturing and engineering firms. In recent years, Tier-1 Indian product startups and mid-sized firms have participated. The average package is around 12 to 13 LPA for CS and IT, and the highest is 24 LPA by Goldman Sachs on campus.
content.Infrastructure: The campus of the institute has amenities like a Co operative store, Dispensary, Bank, Canteen, Staff Quarters, Hostels, Gymnasium, Sports Complex, etc. Very soon, there will be a post office inside the campus. The Golden Jubilee Auditorium of the institute has a seating capacity of 275 people. The canteen of the college serves food and beverages to students, staff and faculty members.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members here are very interactive and supportive.

content.Placements: For specifically CS, IT, and ECE, the placements here are pretty good, and for core branches like ME, CE, EE, and EI, they are not up to the mark, it was around an average of 5 LPA to 6 LPA. There are other branches like IPE and BME, particularly BME and IPE, where the average salary offered is 3 LPA to 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: SGSITS hostels offer decent, sometimes basic, accommodations. However, hostels here are expensive but have good amenities. Food quality is mixed (average to poor in general, better in newer messes), medical care involves a dispensary, and sports facilities include grounds and indoor games, though reviews suggest food/facilities vary, with many nearby cafes offering better food options than the canteen.

paragraphs: SGSITS admissions 2026 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around SGSITS admissions 2026:
Application Process

SGSITS admission process starts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at SGSITS. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG and UG courses at SGSITS is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as JEE Main and CMAT for the selection of respective courses.
Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

SGSITS feesmay include various components such as Tuition Fees, Admission Fees, etc. Candidates have to pay a certain amount of fees at the time of admission. The university accepts various payment methods, including, credit card, debit card, net banking, and UPI. The table below mentions theSGSITS Feesfor various UG & PG courses:

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for MBA admission at SGSITS Indore?
faqs.answer: Candidates wishing to join MBA programs in SGSITS Indore have to possess a Bachelor's degree with at least three years duration and an aggregate score of 50% from an UGC/AICTE-approved Indian or foreign university recognised by AIU. If one belongs to SC/ST/OBC category of Madhya Pradesh they need 45% in graduation.

faqs.question: What are the minimum marks required for MBA at SGSITS Indore 2023?
faqs.answer: The minimum marks that required for the MBA programme at SGSITS Indore in 2023 were:50% aggregate marks in any UGC/AICTE approved bachelor's degree for general category candidates.45% aggregate marks in any UGC/AICTE approved bachelor's degree for SC / ST/ OBC  (excluding creamy layer) category candidates of Madhya Pradesh.

faqs.question: How do I proceed after applying for SGSITS MBA courses?
faqs.answer: Once SGSITS has closed the application portal, eligible students are required to participate in the counselling process conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DTE) Bhopal. In this counselling, the MBA seats are allocated based on the candidate's performance in the accepted entrance exam (CMAT) and the availability of seats. Those who are allocated a seat must complete the admission confirmation process.

faqs.question: Can I take admission in SGSITS MBA without CMAT?
faqs.answer: No, getting admission into SGSITS MBA courses is not possible without taking CUET. For admission to its MBA courses, the institute only accepts valid CMAT scores. Other than this, it is also essential that students aspiring to enrol into the programme meet the eligibility criteria prescribed by the institute and participate in the centralised counselling process conducted by DTE Bhopal.

faqs.question: Are SGSITS MBA admissions merit based?
faqs.answer: No,Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and Science MBA admissionsare not merit-based. As per the available information on the official website, students who wish to take admission must have appeared for CMAT. They are also required to fulfil the eligibility criteria and participate in the centralised online counselling conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DTE), Bhopal.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for MBA at SGSITS?
faqs.answer: Students who have passed a bachelor's degree in a relevant discipline with at least 50% marks are eligible to apply for the SGSITS MBA programme. The institute also offers a 5% relaxation in the aggregate for SC/ST/OBC category candidates. Students willing to take admission must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of the admission confirmation stage.

notes: Note: This information is taken from official sources. It may change.

placement_data.title: SGSITS Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: SGSITS placement cell has comprises departmental heads, faculty coordinators, skill development and placement officers. The training and placement cell works along-with the industry partners to offer better placement opportunities to its students.

According to SGSITS NIRF reports 2025, total of 420 students were placed and 98 students were selected for higher studies out of total 704 students during BTech placement 2024 . Further, BTech students received median package of INR 7 LPA in 2024. The median package offered during SGSITS placement 2024 for the MBA program stood at INR 3 LPA . A total of 17 students were placed out of 57 students.

faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at SGSITS Indore?
faqs.answer: Program for Self-Finance: SGSITS provides just one MBA programme for self-finance.Year-for-year Breakdown: The two-year fees are split into four semesters. The first semester requires the largest initial payment, which comes to about Rs.66,140 and includes tuition, incidental, development, and other costs.Remaining Semesters: The fees for the remaining semesters will be Rs.59,375 to Rs.59,540, which is a slight reduction. Extra Costs: In addition to tuition, take into account mess, exam, library, and activity costs. Hostels may also be necessary. Scholarship Opportunities: Merit and other factors determine eligibility for a limited number of scholarships. Official Resources: Visit the SGSITS website or download the most recent booklet on the MBA programme to get the most up-to-date and comprehensive information on the cost schedule.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities and placements are decent, but the fees are a bit high.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are decent, but the fees being charged for them are a bit too high. The classrooms and labs are equipped with all the required instruments. The library is good, and a lot of books are available here that are needed for every course. The food is decent, but again, the fees are very high. The total fees for a semester are 48,000 rupees. The sports facilities are not that good, but you can play almost all the casual games. The gymkhana is good and is equipped ...

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are supportive, and have a good placement record compared to others in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: You will get all basic facilities, including a library, all sports facilities, well-equipped classrooms and Wi-Fi facility with a computer lab. Medical facilities are also available, and hostel and mess food are average. If you do not want the college hostel, there are many PG flats available in nearby areas.

reviews.review_heading: College is good, but students are not satisfied due to the increase in fees.
reviews.review_text: College has good facilities, it has a large cricket ground. Good basketball court, volleyball court, badminton court, lawn tennis court. The college has a vast collection of books in the library. Students get a monthly magazine and daily English and Hindi newspapers.

reviews.review_heading: College is better for the students in Madhya Pradesh than other private or government colleges.
reviews.review_text: The campus of the institute has amenities like a Co operative store, Dispensary, Bank, Canteen, Staff Quarters, Hostels, Gymnasium, Sports Complex, etc. Very soon, there will be a post office inside the campus. The Golden Jubilee Auditorium of the institute has a seating capacity of 275 people. The canteen of the college serves food and beverages to students, staff and faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members here are very interactive and supportive.
reviews.review_text: SGSITS hostels offer decent, sometimes basic, accommodations. However, hostels here are expensive but have good amenities. Food quality is mixed (average to poor in general, better in newer messes), medical care involves a dispensary, and sports facilities include grounds and indoor games, though reviews suggest food/facilities vary, with many nearby cafes offering better food options than the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: B. Pharma review at SGSITS Indore.
reviews.review_text: Labs are updated, and frequent industry visits take place, though limited in the first year. The library is the same for B. Tech and B. Pharma for all years' students. Hostel is run down, and food is horrible. Wi-Fi isn't available in hostels. There are lots of water problems in the hostel. Very limited medical facilities exist. There is a first aid shed outside the first-year boys’ hostel, which is only open for the first few hours of the day and remains closed the rest of the time.

reviews.review_heading: If you are from Madhya Pradesh, then definitely prioritize this college.
reviews.review_text: The campus size is small, but the college is located in the centre of the city, Indore, so everything is nearby. Don't expect quality faculty, the labs are a little too old, campus has only 1 cafe, canteen food is good, but hostel food is like 3/10. The hostel seats are very limited for boys.

reviews.review_heading: It has high fees with zero facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are very bad because the hostels are very old. The hostel food at my college is very bad. Sports facilities are not much better. There is no Wi-Fi in hostel rooms.

reviews.review_heading: It has strong academics with growing placements.
reviews.review_text: The Civil Engineering department at SGSIT Sindhor is well-equipped with special classrooms, Wi-Fi, modern labs, and a rich library that supports both academic and projects. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, regular maintenance, and basic medical support. The mess and canteen provide average food. Sports grounds and indoor games encourage recreation and fitness. Overall, the infrastructure balances academic and study life efficiency.

reviews.review_heading: It is overall a good college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Classrooms and labs are good. I don't know about hostel facilities as my sister lives in a rented flat, but she said that the college is good, the campus is also good, and the labs are pretty good, so that you can learn something, whatever your course is.

reviews.review_heading: SGSITS has good faculty, average placements, large alumni network, very high fees and limited campus
reviews.review_text: The campus size of our college is just 35 acres. Considering the limitations of the area, the campus is built well. It has a cricket ground, a basketball court, a tennis court, and a sports complex. It has a computer lab, a central library, stationery, a gymnasium, a canteen, and a dining hall. Wi-Fi is not available in the whole campus its available in a few parts, like library & computer lab only. For newcomers, I have mentioned that the gym is there, but its of no use for most of you because ...

reviews.review_heading: The college is excellent, you should take admission.
reviews.review_text: There are so many labs, classrooms, and a central library for study from morning to late night. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is very neat and clean. The quality and taste of food is hygienic and acceptable. There is a playground for games and a sports complex for sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good for studying.
reviews.review_text: About 5-6 acres of land are covered for the college campus, and there are labs and classrooms separately for every department for study. There is a central library for study. The quality of facilities in my hostel is very good. There is an RO water cooler for drinking purposes, a playground for outdoor games, and a sports complex for indoor games. The quality and taste of food in my mess are acceptable and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very relevant for placement purposes.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there is a central library for study purposes, and there are many labs and classrooms in each department for their purpose. There is also a whole LAN and Wi-Fi connection. The quality of the hostel is very good, neat, and clean. The food in the mess and canteen is reliable to eat and hygienic. There is a dispensary for medical purposes as well.

reviews.review_heading: SGSITS is a good option for Madhya Pradesh college level counselling.
reviews.review_text: There are spacious classrooms for lectures and other academic purposes. Departmental labs for various disciplines, including civil, chemistry computer, electrical, electronics, mechanical, and physics. A central library with a vast collection of books, journals (print and online), and reference materials. There are four boys' hostels with a total capacity for 600 students. There are three girls' hostels with a capacity for 467 students. Wi-Fi is available, and security is ensured with 24/7 guard...

data.description: In Shri GS Institute of Technology and Science the food is not good. In the hostel, mess food is not good. In dinning hall which is also present in the college campus where you will get decent food but you have to pay extra for eating in dining hall.

likes.text: Some top recruiting companies like Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, Eicher, Suzuki, etc., visit our college for placements.
For computer science and IT, the placements are good, and almost all students get placed except for students who choose a higher study and other sectors.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is not a good college for the B. Pharma course.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of placements that you'll get guaranteed is less. Among 100%, only 20% of students will get placed. The highest salary package offered may be around 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Only a few students get internships and the others have to do it on their own. There are good companies that visit our college for providing placements but I doubt anyone would get one.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, Wi-Fi is available. There is a library with books available for free. There are annual sports and a gym is available. The canteen is a bit chaotic but if you can compromise, you can pass by. Labs have all the equipment. But sometimes, you have to borrow stuff from other labs. The instruments are not enough for everyone to begin with.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good and could be made much better.

review_content.Placements: The placements are not the best in our college. A few good companies come to HK, but the placement rate still remains low due to a high number of management quota students. This causes a lot of internal strikes too. But that doesn't mean no one gets placement. 30% of students get placed, which means you have to be in the top 30%.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are good and air-conditioned, though I have never have seen them. The library has quite a lot of volumes but is not ventilated well. Labs have lots of equipment, but it looks quite old. There is no college Wi-Fi. The canteen is not that good, and it barely has water bottles. There is no vegetarian food. The gym is well-equipped. There is no working water tap anywhere on campus.

review_summary.college_name: H.K. College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This is honest review of college. If we include all the factor then the college is good.

content.Placements: So, the B.Pharma batch contains around 100 students. Around 20 to 30 percent of students get placed every year. The highest package is 5 LPA, and the average is around 3 LPA, while the lowest is around 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies that come to our college are Cipla, Dabur, Himalayan, and Sun Pharma. The internship program in college is very good; each student gets an internship in a hospital or industry like Cipla or Tata. Roles like HR, Quality Control, and Marketing Department roles are offered in our college by companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good library, canteen, playground, auditorium facilities, and also Wi-Fi is available. In our classrooms, projectors are available where we see PPTs and study. Hospital facilities are not available in our college, but PGs are available near the college. The canteen environment is good and provides healthy food. Various sports events are also held in our college, where sports like cricket, football, and indoor games like carrom and chess are played.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good intentions. It is a bit strict.

content.Placements: About 10% of students got selected by good companies but not the top ones. The highest salary package was offered by TCS to a guy in the MR department. Cipla, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, TCS, and Mankind also came for recruitment. The condition of Internships is not good. You will not get a stipend, but the experience will be provided. MR and computer students are preferred.
content.Infrastructure: You will get all types of instruments required for study purposes. All labs are in good condition. The batch capacity is 25. No one ever tries to enter the hostel because it is nearly impossible to get in. The area is quite expensive for paying guests. The campus has IT rooms and Wi-Fi. The library is pretty good. Classrooms are air-conditioned and well-lit. The cafeteria is not good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is not a good college for the B. Pharma course.

content.Placements: The percentage of placements that you'll get guaranteed is less. Among 100%, only 20% of students will get placed. The highest salary package offered may be around 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Only a few students get internships and the others have to do it on their own. There are good companies that visit our college for providing placements but I doubt anyone would get one.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, Wi-Fi is available. There is a library with books available for free. There are annual sports and a gym is available. The canteen is a bit chaotic but if you can compromise, you can pass by. Labs have all the equipment. But sometimes, you have to borrow stuff from other labs. The instruments are not enough for everyone to begin with.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is good and could be made much better.

content.Placements: The placements are not the best in our college. A few good companies come to HK, but the placement rate still remains low due to a high number of management quota students. This causes a lot of internal strikes too. But that doesn't mean no one gets placement. 30% of students get placed, which means you have to be in the top 30%.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are good and air-conditioned, though I have never have seen them. The library has quite a lot of volumes but is not ventilated well. Labs have lots of equipment, but it looks quite old. There is no college Wi-Fi. The canteen is not that good, and it barely has water bottles. There is no vegetarian food. The gym is well-equipped. There is no working water tap anywhere on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good.

content.Placements: There was a placement cell in the college. Not many companies visited the campus for placements, but some companies like Abbott, TCS, and Quintiles visited the campus to hire the students. The salary package offered to placed students was average. I would say the placement cell could be more efficient if they help at least 50% of the students to get placed in the campus placements. Training is necessary for the students to get placed in campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are huge with the air-conditioning facility, and the wooden benches in the classrooms are comfortable. Labs are well-built and are equipped with all the instruments. All the labs are kept clean and hygienic. The quality of the food in the canteen is good, and the canteen is too small. The area should be well-built and expanded. I haven't faced any issues regarding the infrastructure.

library.description: The institute library has collection of 5157 volumes, 1452 titles for ug and 230 volumes, 140 titles for pg and 22 national and over 15 international printed journal. The library also has the subscription of 23 e journals of Bentham Science, e granthalaya with OPAC

library.description: The institute library has collection of 5157 volumes, 1452 titles for ug and 230 volumes, 140 titles for pg and 22 national and over 15 international printed journal. The library also has the subscription of 23 e journals of Bentham Science, e granthalaya with OPAC

sports.description: Available Facilities: Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Pharmaceutics Lab, Pharmaceutical chemistry Lab, Pharmacology Lab, Pharmacognosy Lab, Pharmaceutical Analysis Lab, Microbiology Lab, Biotechnology Lab, Biochemistry Lab, Organic Chemistry Lab, Anatomy Lab, Physiology Lab, Path Physiology Lab, Analytical Instrumentation Room

reviews.review_heading: This is honest review of college. If we include all the factor then the college is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good library, canteen, playground, auditorium facilities, and also Wi-Fi is available. In our classrooms, projectors are available where we see PPTs and study. Hospital facilities are not available in our college, but PGs are available near the college. The canteen environment is good and provides healthy food. Various sports events are also held in our college, where sports like cricket, football, and indoor games like carrom and chess are played.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good intentions. It is a bit strict.
reviews.review_text: You will get all types of instruments required for study purposes. All labs are in good condition. The batch capacity is 25. No one ever tries to enter the hostel because it is nearly impossible to get in. The area is quite expensive for paying guests. The campus has IT rooms and Wi-Fi. The library is pretty good. Classrooms are air-conditioned and well-lit. The cafeteria is not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a good college for the B. Pharma course.
reviews.review_text: In our college, Wi-Fi is available. There is a library with books available for free. There are annual sports and a gym is available. The canteen is a bit chaotic but if you can compromise, you can pass by. Labs have all the equipment. But sometimes, you have to borrow stuff from other labs. The instruments are not enough for everyone to begin with.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and could be made much better.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are good and air-conditioned, though I have never have seen them. The library has quite a lot of volumes but is not ventilated well. Labs have lots of equipment, but it looks quite old. There is no college Wi-Fi. The canteen is not that good, and it barely has water bottles. There is no vegetarian food. The gym is well-equipped. There is no working water tap anywhere on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are huge with the air-conditioning facility, and the wooden benches in the classrooms are comfortable. Labs are well-built and are equipped with all the instruments. All the labs are kept clean and hygienic. The quality of the food in the canteen is good, and the canteen is too small. The area should be well-built and expanded. I haven't faced any issues regarding the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Hkcp comes under top 10 colleges for pursuing Degree/Masters in Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text:
Well maintained infrastructure
Has all pharma related labs for practicals 
Computer labs
Auditorium
Classrooms with filly air-conditioning facilities
Library (having all types of pharma related books, newspapers. )
Canteen for students as well as staff of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and well-educated teachers who have done Masters + Ph.D. in pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our HK college of pharmacy is very well maintained. Facilities are best. Good and well-knowledge teachers provide us and try to make our concept clear and our library contains different authors' books on the same subject like a book on human anatomy and physiology by Ross and Wilson.

reviews.review_heading: I am partially satisfied because of placements, no hostel, etc. Teachers are good at teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. College offers us lots of facilities like labs, a gym, boys' and girls' common rooms, a canteen, and well-maintained washrooms. The college does not have any hostels. The college should have a hostel for students. Otherwise, the campus is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because the infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides the best facilities to students because it thinks students should be better in the future. All things are provided like Wi-Fi and lab facilities for practicals. Classrooms are also good, and all books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Review of H.K. College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: It had beautiful infrastructure, students like in a pharmacy college. It had all the necessary laboratories and instruments, and students want in a pharmacy profession. It comprises of 3 floors and had a huge auditorium for functions and seminars performed by college staff. It had a playground for sports activities, and an average canteen I must say it had to develop and I aspect that libraries will upgrade in recent years. I have my best life in this college.

paragraphs: Candidates are shortlisted for the courses offered byJan Nayak CDL College of Pharmacythrough a merit-based admission process. The institute currently offers courses at the UG and PG levels.

For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department. The institute provides courses in in stream ofMedicine and Health Sciences. faqs.answer: A:    Academic Requirements: Candidates must have passed the 10+2 exam or an equivalent test from a board or institution that is recognized.Subjects covered in the Qualifying Examination: Chemistry, Physics, and Mathematics are required courses for candidates to take.Minimum Percentage: Depending on their category (general, SC, ST, OBC, EWS, etc.), candidates must have received a minimum percentage in the qualifying exam. Generally, applicants must have completed the qualifying exam with a minimum cumulative score of 45–50%.Exam Score: The candidate's performance in state- or national-level entrance exams, such as the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET (Andhra Pradesh Engineering, Agriculture, and Medical Common Entrance Test), JEE Main (Joint Entrance Examination), or other comparable exams accepted by the university, may determine their admission to the B.Tech programme at SPMVV.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech programme offered by Sri Padmavati Mahila Visvavidyalayam?

faqs.answer: A:    Hi Nishar Ahmed Candidates should be among the top 2,50,000 successful candidates (including all categories) in B.E./B.Tech. paper of JEE (Main) 2023. The percentages of various categories of candidates to be shortlisted are: 10% for GEN-EWS,  27% for OBC-NCL,  15% for SC,  7.5% for ST, and the remaining 40.5% is OPEN for all.

review_summary.college_name: SPMVV Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good and nice college for me.

content.Placements: It is a very good college, and 50 percent of students are placed in different companies. The highest package in our college for our branch is just 7 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course are TCL and Google.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are available in our college for our department, including good Wi-Fi connections and very high-end computers. We have a big space in the labs. The classrooms are very good, and the library is useful. Mess is good and neat.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great placements, supportive faculty, and excellent campus life with modern facilities.

content.Placements: Around 85% of students in our course got placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Capgemini. About 70% got internships in reputed IT firms as software developers and analysts.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has Wi-Fi, advanced labs, smart classrooms, and a well stocked library. Hostel offers clean rooms, good mess and canteen food, medical support, and ample sports facilities for games, ensuring a balanced academic and campus life. All facilities are available in my campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college, and their communication with students is excellent.

content.Placements: Most students get placements with good packages. Students will know every skill about the job, and an interview will give them good experience. The placements depend on skills, not the semester percentage in exams. The placements are also held one by one, and everyone gets a good job.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is perfect about my course, but sometimes the hostel food is not good. The hostel accommodation is clean and neat. The hostel is not a jail, it's equal to a home, and it has a warm and inviting atmosphere. A secure environment measure is in place to protect residents.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a placement cell.

content.Placements: In this college, there are many courses offered like degree B.Teach, MCA, M.Sc. pharma, and nursing like that courses are available in my college. We will do an internship in your final year. The internship will be very useful to us in getting a job in the software companies.
content.Infrastructure: In my college labs are available for doing practical work. The college provides Wi-Fi to the students. Classrooms are very clean and pleasant. There is a playground, canteen, and also a hospital in my college. The food is very delicious in our hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: According to college it is good, but placements are not upto the mark last year but it is better now

content.Placements: As of now, half of the strength is placed, and placements are still going on in our batch. Whereas, in our seniors' batch, only half were placed, as it was a recession period at that time. Now, we are doing internships in NARL and various companies based on the recommendations we have.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, and all are available with good infrastructure. The library is separate for B. Tech students on the campus itself. In hostels, Wi-Fi is available, but we have to adjust according to the food provided in the mess. Coming to hostels, they are good, but we have to maintain them.

admission_overview.college_name: SPMVV Admission: Fee, Courses, Application Process

paragraphs: SPMVV admission process 2024is based onmeritorentrance testconducted at the State/ National level. SPMVV provides more than 70 courses at UG, PG and other levels, such asB.E. / BTech, BFA,M.Ed,MSc etc.These courses are offered through various departments which areSchool of Sciences,School of Social Sciences, School of Nursing, Pharmaceutical Technology, School of Engineering.

There is a common entrance exam (SPMVV CET)conducted bySri Padmavati Mahila Visvavidyalayam(Women's University) to select the candidates for the PG programmes, such as MSc Psychology, MSc Statistics etc.

Sri Padmavati Mahila Visvavidyalayam (Women's University) offer a variety of programmes in Engineering and Management. Candidates from professional courses, such as B.E., BTech, MBBS etc., are advised to ensure that they are eligible for their desired course.
