faqs.question: Does SPMVV accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: Yes, it accepts the JEE scores also for giving admission into B.Tech courses. The admission in Sri Padmavati Mahila Vishvavidyalay is given based on ranks obtained in JEE mains, Andhra Pradesh EAMCET, TS EAMCET or Any State Level Eligibility Test,   Marks in BIE or Equivalent in the order of preference indicated.So one is provided with a wide variety of exams to appear for to take admission in this university.

faqs.question: Can I join SPMVV directly?
faqs.answer: There is no direct admission anywhere. There is a particular procedure for everything. So for taking admission in Sri Padmavati Mahila Vishvavidyalay also, one has to follow a procedure. One has to first fill the application forms and then if one is eligible for admission, her/his merit will be considered as the admission takes place according to the cutoff and ranking system which one secures in the entrance exams. If the person is selected, he/she will be given admission after that.

faqs.question: What score is needed for admission to various courses offered at Sri Padmavati Mahila Visvavidyalayam?
faqs.answer: Exams for Entrance: For some courses, SPMVV administers its own entrance exams; for others, it may take into account the results of entrance exams administered at the state or federal levels. Applicants should confirm whether specific admission examinations are needed for the programs in which they are interested.Eligibility Requirements: SPMVV establishes particular requirements for each course, such as minimal educational background, a minimum percentage or CGPA, and subject-specific prerequisites. For admission, candidates must make sure they match these requirements.merit-based Admission: Merit-based admission to certain courses may be decided by a candidate's performance on the qualifying exam or entrance exam results. Every year, the cutoff scores for admission change based on many criteria such as the volume of applications and exam difficulty.

Candidates must pay the application fee to submit the form. Steps to fill the application form are registration, form filling and fee payment.

placement_report.college_name: SPMVV Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: SPMVV Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024 released by Sri Padmavathi Mahila Visvavidyalayam, the median package offered during BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at I NR 4 LPA and INR 5.58 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during BPharm and MPharm placements 2023 stood at INR 2.18 LPA and INR 2.8 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, a total of 520 offers were made to 320 BTech/ MTech students of the School of Engineering & Technology. Cognizant (GenC) was the top recruiter that offered 85 job offers. SPMVV highest package offered during 2022 placements was INR 10 LPA .

faqs.question: Are MBA placements at Sri Padmavati Mahila Visvavidyalayam good?
faqs.answer: As of November 2022, the lowest compensation available was 4-5 LPA, while the highest was 8–10 LPA. Good Placement Rate: Success rates for placements may different, but they can reach 80% or more. Recruiting organizations: A different no. of HR, finance, and marketing organizations, as well as IT firms such as TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, and Wipro, visited for recruitment The institution tells that the top compensation package has increased from previous years. Training programs for technical knowledge, communication skills, and mock interviews are offered by the placement cell. Check Alternatives: Look into placement details from different colleges to provide a more thorough comparison.

faqs.question: Is Sri Padmavati Mahila Visvavidyalayam really good placements wise?
faqs.answer: Placement Record: Examine the institution's placement history over the previous several years to ascertain the proportion of students placed as well as the businesses that have visited the campus to recruit. Industry Connections : Take into account the university's ties to businesses and associations in order to find internships, projects, and job placements. Students' placement chances may be improved by having close relationships with respectable businesses. Training and Placement Cell: Evaluate the efficiency with which students receive career counseling, soft skill training, resume development, and interview preparation from the university's training and placement cell. Alumni Network: One of the most important resources for placement assistance is the alumni network. Examine the contributions made by the SPMVV alumni network.

faqs.question: What is the average package for B.Pharma students at Sri Padmavati Mahila Visvavidyalayam?
faqs.answer: The Sri Padmavati Mahila Visvavidyalayam BPharma average package for the year 2022 has not been released. As per the reports of 2022, the SPMVV BPharma median package offered during placements in 2021 was INR 1.44 LPA. Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

highlights.description: One of India’s top institutes is SPMVV. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #60 under the category Pharmacy. SPMVV is top ranked by multiple national ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the SPMVV rankings.

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Andhra Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
SPMVV has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, SPMVV fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated stability in trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, SPMVV's rank is #60, the same as last year's rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has shown stability in trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, SPMVV's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the SPMVV latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

reviews.review_heading: Great placements, supportive faculty, and excellent campus life with modern facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our department has Wi-Fi, advanced labs, smart classrooms, and a well stocked library. Hostel offers clean rooms, good mess and canteen food, medical support, and ample sports facilities for games, ensuring a balanced academic and campus life. All facilities are available in my campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college, and their communication with students is excellent.
reviews.review_text: Everything is perfect about my course, but sometimes the hostel food is not good. The hostel accommodation is clean and neat. The hostel is not a jail, it's equal to a home, and it has a warm and inviting atmosphere. A secure environment measure is in place to protect residents.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a placement cell.
reviews.review_text: In my college labs are available for doing practical work. The college provides Wi-Fi to the students. Classrooms are very clean and pleasant. There is a playground, canteen, and also a hospital in my college. The food is very delicious in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: According to college it is good, but placements are not upto the mark last year but it is better now
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and all are available with good infrastructure. The library is separate for B. Tech students on the campus itself. In hostels, Wi-Fi is available, but we have to adjust according to the food provided in the mess. Coming to hostels, they are good, but we have to maintain them.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with great facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has good facilities and infrastructure for students. The college campus has a good environment, separate workshops, buildings, etc. It provides facilities like free Wi-Fi, good labs, and classrooms. The library is useful to students. It also has multiple sports grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, placement are growing gradually and campus life is very interesting.
reviews.review_text: In the college and hostel, we have 24/7 free Wi-Fi available, and the labs are efficient. Sanitation is maintained properly. We have a physical health care center available anytime, a yoga center, a sports club, etc. We have an open ground for sports, including an indoor auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, but it would be better if they brought more placements for this year.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides various infrastructural facilities like a hostel, cafeteria, library with a wide range of collections, etc. The university also provides ATM facilities, an indoor stadium, and a gym to the students. The quality of all these facilities mentioned above is of utmost quality, and the food in the mess and canteen is very good, especially the breakfast provided in the morning. They have various sports accessories like balls, shuttlecocks, nets, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, it's a great university with all the facilities that are helpful to students .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The facilities they provide are awesome. In our department we have Wi-Fi, library, classrooms moot court, etc. In our hostel, we also have a Wi-Fi facility, beds, etc. They will provide with games, music, and extra curricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: College life at SPMVV, Tirupati, is excellent.
reviews.review_text: The facilities they are providing are good; there are a wide range of labs and classrooms and good infrastructure; there are two libraries in the college; full Wi-Fi is available in the college; the quality of food and hostel facilities is medium; there is a ground in the college to play; yoga classes are available in the morning; and there is also a small medical hospital in the college; they provide tables and all.

reviews.review_heading: Except food, everything is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is too good. As we have adjusted for food, it is not up to the mark. Wi-Fi is available in the college and hostels. Medical facilities are available. Sports are also encouraged here; they also encourage people to participate in the tournaments and South Zone competitions too.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good teachers but the food served in the mess is not good.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There is a decent library in this college. Library cards are given to all students at this university. We can borrow books from the library for 30 days. Our campus is eco-friendly. The food served in the mess is very good. Canteen is available. Medical facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Neither satisfactory but nor too bad.
reviews.review_text: There are several blocks for hostel. We can't expect which block will be given for B.Tech. Some block are good but some are very bad, even without sunlight. In hostel, food is completely veg. Taste is very bad. Better to take outside hostels. But the college hostel charge an average of 2.7k INR per month.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our supportive teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi to students. Our college has a digital laboratory to download books or journals for research projects. We have a central library through which we can gain knowledge of all topics. Our classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college had good placements in 2022 and non-vegetarian food is available.
reviews.review_text: The frequency of Wi-Fi is low. The library is good and all types of books are available. Medical facilities are good and interested members can join sports. Our hostel building is too old so facilities are fewer in our hostel. Our college does not serve non-vegetarian food, and some hostels do not have a proper network.

review_summary.college_name: Amrita School of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An excellent college choice.

content.Placements: About 50% of students got placed from our pass-out batch through interviews with various pharmaceutical companies like IQVIA, Sun Pharma, etc. The top roles offered by the company are sales associate, data analyst, etc. About 60% to 70% of our pass-out batch got internships in various companies and industries.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is excellent. It has classrooms with projectors and 10 to 12 well-equipped labs out of which 5 to 6 PG labs are fully air conditioned. It has a well-structured library with at least 10,000 books. The hostel facilities are great too. It has free Wi-Fi. It's kept clean all the time. Hostel has lifts which works 24/7.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good placements with more than 70%.

content.Placements: Our college offered 100% placement facility. More than 70% of students got placements in my batch. Highly reputed pharmaceutical companies came to interview our students and gave them placements. Faculty members give more support and give all instructions like how we have to give the interview or about our performance. They also give training for that.
content.Infrastructure: Labs were very big and all materials required for each experiment were present in that lab. All the students got a chance to do and learn all experiments. Digital library was one of the best advantages of this college. All the books mentioned in the syllabus were present in the library. Hostel was very hygienic and bathroom facilities were very good. Food was also good and healthy. Yearly college conducted arts fest and sports fest.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Life in Amrita School of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: In Amrita School of Pharmacy, all students get placements. The highest package offered is 5 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Apollo Pharmacy, Dr. Reddy's, GSK, and Sun Pharma. The college provides internships for all students.
content.Infrastructure: The lab facilities available in the college are very good and well-maintained. Various equipment is available in the lab. Free Wi-Fi is available for hostellers. Students can access two libraries, the college library and the central library. The food available in the mess is not up to the mark.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is pretty good and satisfactory.

content.Placements: There is 100% placement, and the average package is around 3 LPA. GSK and Dr. Reddy are top companies. The roles offered are in Marketing and R&D. My senior batch has multiple roles offered to them. TCS is also a part of the recruiting companies.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel has good infrastructure but less cleanliness compared to other hostels. The food services are also not on par with those of other hostels. The college infrastructure is pretty good. Classrooms are well-lit and have good technologies like projectors and screens.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good, but hostel facilities are not up to mark.

content.Placements: More than 75-80% of students got placed in the last year. The highest salary offered is around Rs 40,000-45,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 20,000-25,000 per month. The top recruiting company is Sun Pharma. The percentage of students who got good placements is above 85%.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good and developed labs for experiments. We have developed machinery to use. Our classrooms have computers, and libraries are filled with books that are relevant to the topics taught. The hostel conditions are average. The food mess is average. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel for students.

admission_overview.college_name: Amrita School of Pharmacy Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: Amrita School of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Amrita School of Pharmacy admission process 2025is bothmeritandentrance-based. The institute offers various undergraduate(BPharm)of four years duration, postgraduate (MPharmfor two years andPharmDfor three years) and doctoral(PhD)programmes for three years. Students who have given theGPATexam are given preference for MPharm and PharmD lateral entry. Candidates who have qualifiedGATE/ UGC-NET/ CSIR-NET or JRF or Research fellowship are eligible to take direct admission in the PhD programme atAmrita School of Pharmacy.
The following table gives the details of allAmrita School of Pharmacy coursesand the selection criteria:
Eligibility
Class 12 in PCB or Mathematics/ Biotechnology/ Computer Science with a minimum of 50% aggregate from a recognised board
Minimum 17 years of age and maximum 23 years on Dec 31 of admission year
Class 12 with 50% aggregate in Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects with Mathematics or Biology or DPharm from a PCI approved institution from a recognised institution
BPharm with 50% aggregate from the institution approved by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI)
GPATorMerit-based+ Interview
MPharm from PCI and AICTE approved institutions or Students who have passed PharmD can also apply
Amrita School of Pharmacy courses fee is devided in to two categories which areScholarship FeeandNon-Scholarship Fee, andNRI Fee. There are other fee also which includeshostel fee, other charges.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While availability of education loans and scholarships have made education accessible but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge.
Below mentioned is Non- Scholarship tuition fee for Amrita School of Pharmacy courses:
Tuition Fees (Investment)
Average Package (Return)
INR 5 lakh - INR 7 lakh
INR 2 lakh - INR 3 lakh
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Amrita School of Pharmacy is open for eligible students. At present, more than 150 candidates can take admission in to the institute. Find below the course-wise seats intake details of Amrita School of Pharmacy, Kochi:
Seats Intake
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Candidates seeking admission into Amrita School of Pharmacy, must ensure that they are meeting the above mentioned eligibility criteria. Eligible candidates can apply online on the official website of the institute. ForBPharm and PharmD admission, the institute conductsAEELexam under Life Sciences, Agriculture and Medical Sciences programmes.
Below is the step by step process for Amrita School of Pharmacy admission:
Step 1: Application
Vist the official websiteamrita.edu,and apply on the page ofSchool of Pharmacy.
Step 2: Selection Round
Step 3: Admission Offer letter
Candidates are need to accept the PAO of the Amrita School of Pharmacy.
Step 4: Fee Payment
After accepting the POA, next step is to make the payment, in AOAP only.
Step 5: Documents Submission
Respective schools are need to be given access in AOAP to view the documents uploaded by applicants. All the documents will be updated in the same portal.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for BPharma in Amrita School of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: The BPharma courses at Amrita School of Pharmacy require candidates registerfor the AEEL entrance exam for admissions. If the candidate scores an aprropriate rank, they are sent a provisional offer letter of admission. Once received, the candidate is required to upload all necessary documents as well as pay the admission fee on the AOAP. If no discrepancies are discovered, the candidate's admission in Amrita School of Pharmacy BPharma courses is complete.

faqs.question: Are admissions to BPharma courses at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham open for 2025?
faqs.answer: No, the last date to apply for BPharma courses at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham was scheduled on 12 May 2025. This date has already passed along with the date for the entrance exam which has also passed. Candidates who wish to gain admissions into BPharma courses at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham will now need to wait for the 2026 admissionsto begin.

faqs.question: Does Amrita School of Pharmacy accept GPAT score?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amrita School of Pharmacy accepts GPAT score for admission to its M.Pharm and Pharm.D (PB) programs. Candidates who have qualified GPAT are given preference in the selection process. For admission related queries, candidates can contact the Admission Co-ordinator at Amrita School of Pharmacy.

faqs.question: Can I join Amrita School of Pharmacy directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can join Amrita School of Pharmacy directly. Candidates who have qualified GATE/ UGC-NET/ CSIR-NET or JRF or Research fellowship are eligible to take direct admission in the PhD programme. For B.Pharm and M.Pharm, admission is based on the score in GPAT. Candidates with Diploma in Pharmacy are eligible for Lateral Entry admission in B. Pharm.

faqs.question: When are seats allocated to applicants at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham for BPharma course?

Further, the placement rate recorded during BPharm and MPharm placements 2023 was 100%.

Earlier, the NIRF report 2023 was out. According to the report, 23 BPharma, 32 MPharma, 5 PG (3-year), and 14 PharmD students were placed during Amrita School of Pharmacy placements 2022. The median package offered to BPharma and MPharma students was INR 4 LPA. For PharmD (3-year) and PharmD (6-year) courses, the median package offered was INR 4 LPA and INR 5.25 LPA, respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amrita School of Pharmacy Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Note: NRI students will have to pay the tuition fee of USD 7000 p

reviews.review_heading: An excellent college choice.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent. It has classrooms with projectors and 10 to 12 well-equipped labs out of which 5 to 6 PG labs are fully air conditioned. It has a well-structured library with at least 10,000 books. The hostel facilities are great too. It has free Wi-Fi. It's kept clean all the time. Hostel has lifts which works 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements with more than 70%.
reviews.review_text: Labs were very big and all materials required for each experiment were present in that lab. All the students got a chance to do and learn all experiments. Digital library was one of the best advantages of this college. All the books mentioned in the syllabus were present in the library. Hostel was very hygienic and bathroom facilities were very good. Food was also good and healthy. Yearly college conducted arts fest and sports fest.

reviews.review_heading: Life in Amrita School of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The lab facilities available in the college are very good and well-maintained. Various equipment is available in the lab. Free Wi-Fi is available for hostellers. Students can access two libraries, the college library and the central library. The food available in the mess is not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: It is pretty good and satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has good infrastructure but less cleanliness compared to other hostels. The food services are also not on par with those of other hostels. The college infrastructure is pretty good. Classrooms are well-lit and have good technologies like projectors and screens.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, but hostel facilities are not up to mark.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good and developed labs for experiments. We have developed machinery to use. Our classrooms have computers, and libraries are filled with books that are relevant to the topics taught. The hostel conditions are average. The food mess is average. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. Opportunities available here should be used appropriately.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and labs are very well maintained. Classrooms are air conditioned. College computer lab with internet facility is available. There is a big sports ground for extra activities. College arts and sports fest are held every year. College hostel is very good. There are separate hostel for boys and girls. Both hostels are well secure.

reviews.review_heading: Review about the ASP Kochi.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure and facilities. It provides all the basic necessities. Talking more about facilities, our college provides a very good lab and library, which are very essential for a pharmacy scholar. Our library has all necessary books, including the latest editions of pharmacopoeia and other important pharmacy-related books. The college also provides proper basic needs like food, mess, canteen, etc.

reviews.review_heading: D.Pharma at Amrita in a nutshell.
reviews.review_text:
We have 1 computer lab for undergraduate students and 1 other lab for PG and Ph.D. students. Both of them has AC. The PG labs has AC and they are pretty cool.
Undergraduate labs don't have AC.
The hostel is pretty strict.
Mess food is bad; only vegetarian option is available. Medical facilities are great; an ambulance is available 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in India for pharmacy course .
reviews.review_text: The college offers a well-maintained lab with qualified lab assistance, a spacious classroom with smart screens and a library with a minimum of 6,000 books and various journal papers. The hostel facility is also available with a decent meal menu. Wi-Fi, a gym, a coffee shop, play courts and study rooms are available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good for studies but not for events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided is the best. The labs, classrooms have good facilities and are spacious. The hostel facilities are too good. The rooms were spacious, and the bathrooms are clean. The rooms were shared by 3-4 persons. The food provided is okay but could be improved.

college_info.intro: PIMS Loni popular programmes are BSc and MBBS. MBBS students are placed in top hospitals and top companies. The students are taught to become professionals who are committed to excellence and are ethical, responsive, and accountable to the community, patients, and profession. MBBS and BSc students can go for higher education such as MSc, MS, and others. Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences is one of the best-ranked universities present in India. Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences is ranked by NIRF 2024 under the University category in the 151-200 Rank Band. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and Pravara Loni Medical College fees:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences offers UG & PG programmes to students. The streams include the Surgery, Medicine, and various other streams. At the UG (undergraduate) level, the university offers BDS, MBBS, BSc, & other courses to students. At the postgraduate (PG) level, the university offers MSc, MD, MS, & other courses to students. There are 6 diploma & certificate programmes available in the university, namely GNM, Paediatric & Neonatal Nursing Certificate Course, Post Basic Diploma in Critical Care Nursing, Post Basic Diploma in Orthopedic and Rehabilitation Nursing, D.M.L.T-Diploma in Medical Lab. Technology, and C.S.S.D-Diploma in Central Sterile Supply Department. Below mentioned are some of the Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Pravara Instiute of Medical Science offers MBBS courses, and admission to the programme is granted on the basis of the score of National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) followed by a National Level counseling. The minimum eligibility criteria for MBBS admission in India is that the candidate must have passed Physics, Chemistry, and Biology in Class 12 or an equivalent examination with 50% or above marks for general category students,  45% for SC/ST/OBC, and 40% for PH and PWD students.

review_content.Placements: There are 25 seats available for this four-year graduation program, and the salary package after graduation is a minimum of 200,000 and up to 500,000 for freshers in India. An internship is mandatory from our college after graduation for one year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, and the classrooms are spacious and equipped with facilities like digital classrooms with boards, and a CCTV security system is inbuilt in every classroom. The campus is fully covered with Wi-Fi for studies, and sports and games are regularly organized by the faculty to help relieve study stress.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my course was 100%. The highest average package can go upto 1-2 lakhs just after completing the internship, whereas the lowest could be 60 thousand per month. After the completion of the course, students from PIMS are recruited in every hospital in India and even in foreign countries due to its popularity and hands-on patient care. Students get to do internship in Pravara's own Pravara rural hospital and Dr. Apj abdul kalam college of physiotherapy .
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel has its own mess, which is maintained and proper measures of hygiene are followed by the mess workers. The hostel has a dedicated gym, a reading hall and an event room. Washrooms and toilets are well maintained with daily cleaning. The hostel staff is very cooperative, with good security staff.

faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, yes indeed. Program Institute of Medical sciences except NEET score for giving admissions to students for MBBS course. As a matter of fact all Medical colleges in India respective of the category to which they belong like government medical colleges, private medical colleges, Medical College of the armed forces, medical colleges of the deemed to be universities or even private universities, these all are mandated by law to give admission in their medical colleges exclusively on the basis of score obtained in nationality exam called NEET. No concession in whatever format is granted to any medical college in the country to give admission without NEET score. Even the management quota seats have to be filled up exclusively on the merit obtained by student in this entrance exam. Program Institute of Medical sciences also follows these rules and gives admissions based on scoring in NEET.Best wishes to you.
faqs.question: Q: Does Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences accept NEET score?

faqs.answer: Admission to all Undergraduate and postgraduate courses will be done on the basis of performance in the All India Entrance Test conducted by PIMS University. The Admission office of PIMS is responsible for conducting the entrance test, declaration of results and merit list, counselling and final admission confirmation to the Nursing programmes.The AICET is conducted during May-June every year for UG courses and in January for PG courses. Below is more detail about All India Entrance Test for Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences admission:The duration of the AICET: Three HoursThe question paper for the CET consists 200 MCQs, each correct answer carries one mark.There is no negative marking
faqs.question: Q: What entrance exam is accepted for admission to B.Sc Nursing at PIMS?

Students don't feel regretted studying from this university as the placement are good and the ROI is also good.
faqs.question: Q: Has anyone regretted studying from PIMS Loni?

faqs.answer: To get admission to Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences, candidates are required to complete the criteria set by the college. Admission will be based on the qualifying marks obtained in NEET UG and counselling. For MD/MS programmes, admission will be based on the qualifying marks obtained in NEET PG and counseeling. Further, for Phd and others courses, college conduct AICTE entrance exam for admission. So to grab the seat candidates are required to follow the complete admission procedure.

overview_faqs.question: Has anyone regretted studying from PIMS Loni?
overview_faqs.answer: Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences is ranked by NIRF 2024 under the University category in the 151-200 Rank Band. PIMS Loni is accredited with an A Grade by NAAC. Most of the students feel happy studying from this university as the university is known for its BSc and MBBS courses. Students don't feel regretted studying from this university as the placement are good and the ROI is also good.

review_summary.college_name: Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (B.D.S.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good college for personal growth, academics, as well as good student life.

content.Placements: All the students are placed easily either into MS programs or clinics because the college is situated in a rural area and is free for patients, a huge patient flow, which is necessary for practice, and hence they are easily employed elsewhere in clinics. Good opportunities are represented for research as well.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available, such as separate gyms with personal trainers in the girls and boys hostels. A mess with 3 meals, a hostel night canteen for late night cravings, two seater rooms as well as NRI rooms, 3 on campus canteens, and a huge sports ground with all equipment.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences deemed to be University complete review.

content.Placements: Placement is not an issue in our field. There are many options available, including abroad and Indian institutes. Mostly, people with higher ranks get better colleges. In the end, the NEET PG exam and its rank decide which college we go to and which specialty we want to pursue.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is quite large and covered with a lot of greenery. It includes a marvelous hospital with a 200-bed capacity, two lecture hall complexes, and two college buildings, along with physiotherapy and dental colleges. There is also a large ground with three boys' hostels and seven girls' hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in (Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Honest College Review 2024.

content.Placements: There are 25 seats available for this four-year graduation program, and the salary package after graduation is a minimum of 200,000 and up to 500,000 for freshers in India. An internship is mandatory from our college after graduation for one year.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, and the classrooms are spacious and equipped with facilities like digital classrooms with boards, and a CCTV security system is inbuilt in every classroom. The campus is fully covered with Wi-Fi for studies, and sports and games are regularly organized by the faculty to help relieve study stress.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (B.P.T) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best medical college you can opt for excellent education and practice .

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my course was 100%. The highest average package can go upto 1-2 lakhs just after completing the internship, whereas the lowest could be 60 thousand per month. After the completion of the course, students from PIMS are recruited in every hospital in India and even in foreign countries due to its popularity and hands-on patient care. Students get to do internship in Pravara's own Pravara rural hospital and Dr. Apj abdul kalam college of physiotherapy .
content.Infrastructure: The hostel has its own mess, which is maintained and proper measures of hygiene are followed by the mess workers. The hostel has a dedicated gym, a reading hall and an event room. Washrooms and toilets are well maintained with daily cleaning. The hostel staff is very cooperative, with good security staff.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This college is good for those students who love academics.

content.Placements: It is a medical college so placements are better but after post-graduation clearance rate is average. This profession is self-made, and students can join a reputed college if they want.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good but there are many restrictions.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are great. They are helpful and knowledgeable. They also scold us if we do not maintain discipline properly. They have also clear National Medical Council Government Body criteria for teaching.
content.Other: Overall in a rural setting, a person who enjoys academics will love this college but there is no nightlife outside campus after 9:00 PM. I opted for this course because of my interest in it. Fests are conducted in this college. National and international level conferences are also held every year, and many students participate in them.

admission_overview.college_name: Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences Courses Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility & Dates

paragraphs: PIMS admission process 2025is bothentrance-basedandmerit-based. Located in Ahmednagar,Pravara Institute of Medical Science (PIMS)offers various UG, PG, and diploma level programmes includingMBBS,BSc, MSc, MDS, GNM, PG diploma, etc. Admission to all Medical and Dental UG and PG courses is done based on the score obtained in theNEETentrance exam. Candidates can apply online by registering on theNEET (NTA)official website. Further, for other courses, the courses conduct theAll India Entrance Test (AICET). Want to know more about Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences admission, along with course-wise eligibility, selection criteria and much more:

Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences admissionis based on the performance of candidates and the rank obtained by them in the entrance examination. The minimum eligibility for the UG programme is Class 12 and Bachelor’s degree for PG programmes and a postgraduate degree. The institute accepts the scores and rank of NEET UG, NEET PG and AICTE for admission to the specific programmes. The table below shows the reliability criteria-selection details for Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences courses:
Check below for more information aboutPravara Institute of Medical Sciences Courses

PIMS feeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some fee components like caution deposits are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Affordability is one of the strong reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Check below thePIMS feeand ROI for top PIMS courses:
Note:Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.

PIMS seat intakevaries course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. In MBBS/BDS/MD/MS/MDS courses, there are 85% of seats available for General category students, and 15% of seats are allocated for Foreign Nationals (FN), NRI, and Persons of Indian Origin (PIO). Find below the course-wise seat intake for the Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences:
Note:Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change

Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences admission 2025 is entrance and merit-based for undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. The college admissions process is a multi-step process. Candidates looking for admission to any of the programmes must register on the official websites ofNEET-UGandNEET-PGfor admission. Further, for PhD, candidates are required to visit the university's official website to apply for admission. Given below is thePIMSadmission process 2025:
Step 1:Application Process 2025

Candidates seeking Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences course admission must apply on the official website of the respective entrance exam. The application process is conducted in online mode. Further, for PhD candidates are required to visit the university's official website to download the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences admission 2025 is strictly based on the score obtained in the entrance exams. For MBBS, MD and MS admission is based on scores of NEET UG and NEET PG, respectively Further, the college also conducted an AICTE entrance exam for admission to some UG, PG and PhD courses. However, the university also offers merit-based admission and admission based on management quota. Every candidate must fulfil the criteria set by the university for their desired courses. Later on, the shortlisted candidates will be allocated seats through a counselling process.
Step 3: Counselling Process

All the NEET qualifiers are required to register forNEET-UG counsellingandNEET-PG counsellingprocess conducted by the MCC on the official website of the conducting body and pay the registration fee and a refundable security deposit. During the choice filling for Round 1, candidates select PIMS and choose their desired course with specialisation. Further, round-wiseNEET-UG cutoffandNEET-PG cutoffwill be released on the official website of MCC. Candidates who manage to secure a seat in Round 1 can proceed with the process, whereas the remaining candidates have to appear for other counselling rounds such as Round 2, Mop-up Round, and Stray Vacancy Round.
Step 4: Physical Reporting & Document Verification

Candidates who are allocated seats are required to download their allotment letter and report at Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences in person for the document verification process and Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences fee payment to lock their seats within the stipulated timeline.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for MBBS at Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences?

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences for MBBS with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Pravara Instiute of Medical Science offers MBBS courses, and admission to the programme is granted on the basis of the score of National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) followed by a National Level counseling. The minimum eligibility criteria for MBBS admission in India is that the candidate must have passed Physics, Chemistry, and Biology in Class 12 or an equivalent examination with 50% or above marks for general category students,  45% for SC/ST/OBC, and 40% for PH and PWD students.

faqs.question: Does Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences accept NEET score?
faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, yes indeed. Program Institute of Medical sciences except NEET score for giving admissions to students for MBBS course. As a matter of fact all Medical colleges in India respective of the category to which they belong like government medical colleges, private medical colleges, Medical College of the armed forces, medical colleges of the deemed to be universities or even private universities, these all are mandated by law to give admission in their medical colleges exclusively on the basis of score obtained in nationality exam called NEET. No concession in whatever format is granted to any medical college in the country to give admission without NEET score. Even the management quota seats have to be filled up exclusively on the merit obtained by student in this entrance exam. Program Institute of Medical sciences also follows these rules and gives admissions based on scoring in NEET.Best wishes to you.

Follow the PIMS Loni application process mentioned below:Step 1:Visit the official website of the NEET.Step 2:Register for the NEET exam.Step 3:Then appear for the NEET Exam.Step 4:Then with valid scores apply on the official website of the university.

placement_data.title: Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 5-year placements 2022 stood at INR 7.2 LPA . Further, the placement rate recorded during UG 5-year placements 2022 was 100%. Apart from this, the median package offered during PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3 LPA and INR 18 LPA , respectively. Earlier, as per the NIRF report 2023, 187 MBBS, 64 MD, 63 BDS and 19 MDS students were placed during PIMS Ahmednagar placements 2022. The median package offered to MBBS and MD students stood at INR 7.5 LPA and INR 18 LPA. For BDS and MDS courses, the median package offered during placements 2022 was INR 3.2 LPA and INR 5.4 LPA, respectively.

nirf.description:
PIMS has consistently been acknowledged as one of the leading institutions in various categories by NIRF 2024, standing out among other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, and outstanding learning environment. In the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend as per the previous year's rankings. outlook.description:

It is observable that in the 'Ayurveda' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Rural Dental CollegeReviewed on 1 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good college for personal growth, academics, as well as good student life.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available, such as separate gyms with personal trainers in the girls and boys hostels. A mess with 3 meals, a hostel night canteen for late night cravings, two seater rooms as well as NRI rooms, 3 on campus canteens, and a huge sports ground with all equipment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Rural Medical College , LoniReviewed on 19 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Pravara Institute of Medical Sciences deemed to be University complete review.
reviews.review_text: The campus is quite large and covered with a lot of greenery. It includes a marvelous hospital with a 200-bed capacity, two lecture hall complexes, and two college buildings, along with physiotherapy and dental colleges. There is also a large ground with three boys' hostels and seven girls' hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Honest College Review 2024.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, and the classrooms are spacious and equipped with facilities like digital classrooms with boards, and a CCTV security system is inbuilt in every classroom. The campus is fully covered with Wi-Fi for studies, and sports and games are regularly organized by the faculty to help relieve study stress.

reviews.review_heading: The best medical college you can opt for excellent education and practice .
reviews.review_text:
The hostel has its own mess, which is maintained and proper measures of hygiene are followed by the mess workers.
The hostel has a dedicated gym, a reading hall and an event room.
Washrooms and toilets are well maintained with daily cleaning.
The hostel staff is very cooperative, with good security staff.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Rural Medical College , LoniReviewed on 4 Dec 2022)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good for those students who love academics.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good but there are many restrictions.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Unlimited Wi-Fi facility is there. There are 3 hostels for boys and many hostel buildings for girls. Hostel building contains 7 floors. A reading hall is available for students on every particular floor of the hostel. Gym facility is the best. Mess is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Rural Medical College , LoniReviewed on 10 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Study wise, the college is okay.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for 24 hours. Classrooms are good and ACs are there in some halls. Hostel infrastructure is old and ventilation is not good. Mess food is okay. Library is also not built according to the modern infrastructure. Though many books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: It is a good college and all facilities are available with good surroundings, a nice environment for study purposes. The college has all the necessary infrastructure and facilities on campus but lacks the latest equipment in the laboratory. The classrooms are vast and spacious. The seating arrangement is comfortable too.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is my dream course.
reviews.review_text: There are 9 hostels in total, and it is segregated in ladies and gents. There are 7 hostels for girls and 2 hostels for boys. The hostel fee is Rs. 64,000, and the mess fee is Rs. 24,000 per year. The food is scheduled for every year, and they follow strictly. I would rate 3 out of 5 for food, but we have a variety of sweets here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Rural Medical College , LoniReviewed on 8 Dec 2019)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with everything as there are really good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel and library. The library is well conditioned and has sufficient space for students to study. The quality of the food served is really nice, and if we give any complaints, then it will be resolved immediately. Classrooms are huge enough and are air-conditioned and have sufficient space to accommodate 200 students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Rural Medical College , LoniReviewed on 23 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college. One of the best-deemed medical colleges in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The college has decent infrastructure. There are well-maintained and modern labs for the respective departments. There is a central library which is good enough. The main highlight is the massive, well-maintained ground. It is beautiful. The college is good academically.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Rural Medical College , LoniReviewed on 9 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is an average experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hospital comprises 200 beds and it being in a rural set up is having a good patient flow. But for the hostels, the ones built recently are accommodated with good facilities as compared to the old ones. But there is a big issue with basic facility of water in the ladies hostel, especially hostel 7. There are many restrictions which are good in some ways but at some point, it feels like trapping the students within them. The basic facilities of boys hostel are better in c...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Rural Medical College , LoniReviewed on 9 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent clinical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Mess is student run, with the menu decided by students themselves. But jokes apart, the food has improved in quality since my first year, and it is a student run mess, so timely feedback is taken. The menu is changed according to the need of the students. Sports facilities are top-notch. A wide variety of sports are available like football, badminton, basketball, cricket, volleyball, and tennis.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Rural Dental CollegeReviewed on 10 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best Deemed medical college .
reviews.review_text:
Pravara institute of medical sciences provides the best hostel facilities and the mess is also very nice. The quantity and quality of food offered in mess is delicious. There is regular electricity and water supply 24/7. Security is also provided in hostels
 .

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and mess are very good. Security provided for students is topmost. Water facility is available. Hostel rectors are polite and solve the problems of the students if any.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the M A Rangoonwala College Of Dental Science & Research Centre is approximately INR 1335000 - INR 1920000.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Great faculty, centrally located, great patient flow with good exposure.

review_content.Placements: Every passout either goes ahead for MDS, opts to open a clinic, or work for one. They are well qualified and trained during the internship program in the college itself, which is a hospital with great patient flow and exposure for students. The students are trained under the supervision of the teachers. As such, there are no placements in dental college.
review_content.Infrastructure: We do have high-speed Wi-Fi, classrooms are spacious and comfortable with 5000+ books in the library along with an e-library. Hostel rooms are good, they could be better . They are a little smaller . There are 2 types of rooms. One with washrooms in the room and 4 people living together, and the other is a washroom outside the room with 2 people living together. There are no mess facilities in the college, but there are catering services which provide tiffins to the students. Canteens are good and affordable also in the vicinity of the hostel and college . Good exposure to sports via competitions. There is a huge ground which many matches take place.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best dental colleges in Pune, Maharashtra.

review_content.Placements: Students can start their own clinic after BDS or can also opt for MS. For MS, you need to appear for NEET MS. There are various MS courses available at MARDC, such as MS orthodontics, MS oral surgery, MS endodontics, MS prosthodontics, MS periodontics and MS pedodontics.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is great. It has various facilities like a library, e-library, huge classrooms, various labs, dissection hall, unlimited Wi-Fi connectivity, canteens, auditorium, playground, etc. The drawback is underground basement classrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I had a good experience in this college.

review_content.Placements: It is one of the oldest pharmacy colleges in Bengal, and the placement cell is good. Last year, the placement rate was 85%, which is good. For B.Pharma, the package offered is 3.9 LPA. Our college organises international seminar every 2 years, and also the faculty are good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are not much big, and the quality of our labs is good. Almost all the equipment and chemicals required for pharmacy practicals are present in our lab. We have a college dress uniform. The college hostels are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: CIPT AHS provides decent placements, infrastructure, and very good faculty.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college are not that good when compared to any other private pharmacy colleges. However, placements are decent here. About 60%-70% of the students get placed every year mostly in the marketing sector. But the placement rate varies every year. The average salary package offered for marketing students is Rs.16,000-22,000 per month. Overall, the college needs to improve its placement numbers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is decent, and it is neither that good nor bad. Classrooms are very good, clean and airy, and they are well-maintained. The library is also good. Most of the laboratories are good and well-equipped. However, some labs need to be well-structured. Medical facilities are not that good. Sports and games are very poor here.

review_summary.college_name: Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best private college for pharmacy in West Bengal.

content.Placements: I am very fortunate that I am a student of Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences. I am a Pharma fresher. My seniors are well placed in companies like Wipro, Cipla, TCA, etc. The highest salary package offered to one of the seniors is 9 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The whole premises has a free Wi-Fi facility. The hostel is one of the best places. The hostel is well cleaned, and the food served in the canteen is good.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are very qualified. They are very helpful, and they help us in our various projects, seminar, and journals. They teach us not as students but as a brother. Semester exams are not too difficult. If anyone goes to college every day and gain the knowledge of faculty, then they crack any exam. Our college has the best faculty members in West Bengal. There are so many students who are pursuing their PhD under the guidance of our faculty.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences.

content.Placements: Placements depend on the batch. The average salary pacakge offered ranges from 1.5 LPA - 3 LPA. The recruiting companies for the course are Medlife, Medplus, Apollo Pharmacy, Sun Pharma, Mankind, etc. All students of diploma in pharmacy students get 500 hours internships in government hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: It provides free Wi-Fi, drinking mineral water, a library, laboratories, a common room, and well-equipped classrooms. There are separated hostels for boys and girls. The quality of food in the canteen is excellent. Medical facilities are also available. Different kinds of sports and games kits are also provided to the students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I had a good experience in this college.

content.Placements: It is one of the oldest pharmacy colleges in Bengal, and the placement cell is good. Last year, the placement rate was 85%, which is good. For B.Pharma, the package offered is 3.9 LPA. Our college organises international seminar every 2 years, and also the faculty are good.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are not much big, and the quality of our labs is good. Almost all the equipment and chemicals required for pharmacy practicals are present in our lab. We have a college dress uniform. The college hostels are good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: CIPT AHS provides decent placements, infrastructure, and very good faculty.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are not that good when compared to any other private pharmacy colleges. However, placements are decent here. About 60%-70% of the students get placed every year mostly in the marketing sector. But the placement rate varies every year. The average salary package offered for marketing students is Rs.16,000-22,000 per month. Overall, the college needs to improve its placement numbers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is decent, and it is neither that good nor bad. Classrooms are very good, clean and airy, and they are well-maintained. The library is also good. Most of the laboratories are good and well-equipped. However, some labs need to be well-structured. Medical facilities are not that good. Sports and games are very poor here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: A review on Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are moderate. Recently, the placement in charge of our college was changed. So, there is a hope that they may increase. For placements, you can find many reputed pharmaceutical industries like Abbott, GlaxoSmithKline, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure. Our college is covered over a large area. It is located far away from pollution and dust, and it is covered by full of green grass, trees, and flowers. Our college is situated far away from external noises. I think this is to be maintained. The buildings in our college are quite good. Overall, you can find a good environment in our college.

hostel_campus.college_name: Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences has separate hostel facility for boys and girls. Boys hostel in located in the campus and a separate ragging free girls hostel is also there within 1 km from the campus. Both the hostels incorporate furniture, electricity with generator back up, sufficient water and many more facilities. Every hostel is monitored under a round the clock warden.

library.description: Calcutta Institute of Pharmaceutical Technology and Allied Health Sciences has a library with a cast collection of 54487 volume of books incorporating 2071 book titles, 115 national journals, 9 international journals, magazines, periodicals, audio videos, CD ROMs, research publication and STM e-journals. The library is well equipped with spacious reading room and wifi facility. The students can visit the library catalog for various subjects through LIBSYS online service available in the library and can place their library books’ requisition through the online system too. Book bank facility is also available in the library.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total BA fee at Rabindranath Tagore University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total Rabindranath Tagore University BA fee vary across the BA specialisations offered at the university. For a BA in Journalism & Mass Communication, the total fee is INR 60,000. It is payable in three annual instalments of INR 20,000. For all other BA specialisations at RNTU Bhopal, the total fee is INR 36,000. The annual instalment for the three-year course comes down to INR 12,000. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the application fee for PhD at Rabindranath Tagore University?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for PhD programme at Rabindranath Tagore University is Rs 2,500.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total BTech fee at Rabindranath Tagore University?
overview_faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University provides a four-year BE course in the full-time mode. The BE fee at RNTU Bhopal is INR 1.8 lakh for various specialisations. It is payable in annual instalments. The fee structure may also include other components, such as admission/registration fees, hostel fees, security deposits, etc. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Does Rabindranath Tagore University have any collaborations?
overview_faqs.answer: For training and placement purposes, The Rabindranath Tagore University has signed MoUs with several organisations like Blue Prism India Private Limited, Rajiv Gandhi Diagnostic Centre, Media & Entertainment Skills Council (New Delhi), Neethi Lab, Kerala Medical Laboratory, Shriram Life Insurance Company, and Kamthi Motors LLP.

review_summary.college_name: Rabindranath Tagore University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty in this college is also good, who teach well and tell the students to stay understanding.

content.Placements: Nice university in Bhopal. Known for its academic excellence and holistic approach. Very nice university in placement. There are many students in our college who are preparing for different courses. Recruiting for AWS, Atos global, Aisect limited, Agromaxx.
content.Infrastructure: Nice hostel and good food.
content.Faculty: Teachers at RNTU are helpful and qualified. Their teaching quality is good with a focus on practical. The course curriculum is relevant and industry-oriented. Semester exams are moderately difficult with a high pass percentage. My university is best. Rabindranath Tagore University, Bhopal, is India's first skill-based university with equal focus on both theoretical and practical learning. Keeping this in mind, the university management has established practical laboratories for all the courses that are conducted in every department.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Soil Science and Agricultural Chemistry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of RNTU Bhopal academics, campus, and beyond.

content.Placements: Placements at RNTU Bhopal for the 2024-25 batch were quite impressive. 85% of students got placed with a package of 15 LPA. The university provides strong internship opportunities. Students get more than 400 internships in top companies. Overall, RNTU offers a good balance of academics.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are decent with basic amenities. The mess food is hygienic but average in taste. Medical and sports facilities are available. RNTU Bhopal provides good infrastructure with smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, good labs, and a rich library for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I would like to suggest this college to every student I know for admission.

content.Placements: Of course, RNTU is one of the best, but I don't think it has the highest chance of placement. Fastly, but placement and internship from our college are actually given, and the percentage of students who got internships is 80-90%. Overall, a good college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the hostel is also good. The security level is safe for students, but as we know, good food in the hostel is not expected. The facilities provided and hostel rooms are good, and overall RNTU is a good one.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a very nice college and its facilities are very good.

content.Placements: Placements are also very good. Overall, in all departments, approximately 80% of students get placed. The lowest salary package in the B.E. CSE course ranges from 5-7 LPA. The highest package is 1.5 crores per annum in B.E. CSE. Top recruiting companies for our course are Amazon, Google, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of our college is very good. Hostels are very well-organised. There are several facilities for students like a gym, library, cricket or football ground, basketball court, badminton court, libraries, etc., and useful facilities are all included.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Average university only for degrees, not for studies.

content.Placements: In Rabindranath Tagore University, there are not much placements. But for sure there is a lot of support and effort put in by placement cells to get students placed especially in engineering and computer science. Companies like Tata, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, etc., visit every year for placements and the average CTC is 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is fine except for network issues. University campus provides hostel guest house, canteen, auditorium, etc. The infrastructure is very good. The main problem is that it is not in Bhopal, it is in Raise. Take admission after knowing all the details.

admission_overview.college_name: Rabindranath Tagore University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Process, Date, Fee

admission_overview.title: Rabindranath Tagore University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Rabindranath Tagore University admission 2025 is open. The university offers an online mode of application submission. Admission to all the courses at the university is offered basis of the entrance exam scores. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria set by the university. Given below is more updated information about Rabindranath Tagore University admission 2025, followed by course-wise eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

eligibility_selection.title: Rabindranath Tagore University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Rabindranath Tagore University course admission is mainly entrance-based. The university offers a wide range of courses in full-time mode. The basic eligibility for all the UG, PG, and doctoral programmes at RNTU Bhopal is merit in the last qualifying examination. However, the selection of candidates for all the courses is basis the scores obtained by the candidates in the AISECT Joint Entrance Exam (AJEE), a university-level entrance exam. Besides this, the university may also accept the scores of national and state-level entrance exams for MBA. The table below lists the popular Rabindranath Tagore University courses along with their admission-related details like eligibility, accepted entrance exams, and fee:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with 45% aggregate (40% for reserved categories) in the Science stream
PG degree with a minimum aggregate of 55% in a relevant field from a recognised university
courses_table.selection_criteria: PhD Entrance Test/ NET/ GATE/ SLET

faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University, shortlists students mainly based on entrance scores. The university accepts valid score secured in the AJEE conducted by AISECT Group of Institutions. It is an in-house test conducted by the GOI for admission to all five of its universities. However, students may get admitted on a merit basis. To know about the RNTU Bhopal admission chances, students can connect with the admission desk of the university.
faqs.question: Can I get into Rabindranath Tagore University without entrance exam?

paragraphs: Admission process of Rabindranath Tagore University starts with filling out the registration form. Candidates willing for admission to Rabindranath Tagore University courses must appear for the accepted entrance exam. The step-wise Rabindranath Tagore University admission process 2025 are below:
Application Process
For admission to various programme offered by Rabindranath Tagore University, candidates must fill out the admission form online by going through the official website of the university.
Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, the candidates must pass Class 12 for admission to UG courses with 45% aggregate and a graduation degree with 50% aggregate for admission to PG. Also, candidates must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university. The university releases the shortlisted candidates’ list based on their performance in the entrance exam.
Final Seat Allotment
The university release a list of shortlisted candidates. To confirm the seats, students are supoose to pay the required fees.

courses_data.name: Rabindranath Tagore University B.E Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Rabindranath Tagore University offers an undergraduate degree inB.E(Bachelor of Engineering). The course is offered for a duration of four years, divided into eight semesters of six months each. Students can pursue the course across multiple specialisations, such asComputer Science & Engineering, Civil Engineering,Mechanical Engineering, and more. The basic eligibility requires students to pass Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board. Students must have studied PCM in Class 12. Selection is entrance-based. Candidates need to appear for the AJEE exam. Find below key highlights forRabindranath Tagore University B.E admission:

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Rabindranath Tagore University B.E admission?
faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University B.E admission is entrance-based. Students wishing to enrol in to the university need to make sure that they satisfy both the basic eligibility and selection criteria to get a seat. The admission criteria of the B.E course is as follows:Class 12 with Maths from a recognised board or equivalent diplomaAJEE examination

faqs.question: What are the B.E courses offered by Rabindranath Tagore University?
faqs.answer: At Rabindranath Tagore University, students are offered several B.E courses at the undergraduate level. These programmes are offered in full-time mode for a duration of four years. The admission criteria is same for all of the specialisations. Find below a list of B.E courses offered by the university:CSECSE in AI & MLCivil EngineeringMechanical EngineeringECEElectrical Electronics Engineering

faqs.question: What are the documents required for verification during BE admission at Rabindranath Tagore University?
faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University BE admission process is incomplete without physical verification of the required documents. Once the candidates are shortlisted for admission, they must report to the campus along with the documents required to confirm their eligibility. Some of these documents are listed below:Class 10 MarksheetClass 12 MarksheetAadhar CardPassport Size PhotosCaste Certificate (if applicable)Migration/Transfer Certificate (if applicable)Any other document required by the universit

faqs.question: How can I apply for BCom admission at Rabindranath Tagore University?
faqs.answer: Rabindranath Tagore University BCom application process is conducted online as well as offline. Candidates willing to apply offline can visit the university's campus to obtain the application form. Alternatively, candidates can apply online through the university's official website. The application form must be submitted with an application fee of INR 500. The steps included in the online application process are presented in the infogaphic below:

faqs.question: How can I get admission to the Rabindranath Tagore University BCom course?
faqs.answer: Aspirants willing to take admission at Rabindranath Tagore University for a BCom must begin with the application process. The process can be completed online or offline. The university screens the received applications and qualifying candidates are called for the selection rounds, which may include a written entrance test, group discussion, interview, etc. The university may also provide direct admissions, subject to fulfilment of the preset criteria. The final step in the admission process it to report to the campus for document verification and submit the first instalment of the course fee.

placement_report.college_name: Rabindranath Tagore University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Rabindranath Tagore University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Rabindranath Tagore University concluded the placements for the Class of 2025. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during Rabindranath Tagore University placements 2025 stood at INR 18 LPA . Further, over 600 recruiters participated in 2025 placements and offered handsome packages to the students of the 2025 batch. More than 6,000 students were placed during the 2025 placement drive. The top recruiters of Rabindranath Tagore University in 2025 included Toyota, Tech Mahindra, Paytm, Infosys, Wipro, Reliance Retail, IndusInd Bank, ICICI Bank, etc.
Rabindranath Tagore University (RNTU) Placements 2025 Highlights

The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. nirf.description:
Over the years, RNTU has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the NIRF 2025. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the RNTU's rankings in 'University' category have displayed stability in trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2025, RNTU's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Engineering' category have displayed a stable trend when evaluated against previous year's rankings. In 2025, RNTU's rank is #201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
