reviews.review_heading: Faculty in this college is also good, who teach well and tell the students to stay understanding.
reviews.review_text: Nice hostel and good food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of RNTU Bhopal academics, campus, and beyond.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are decent with basic amenities. The mess food is hygienic but average in taste. Medical and sports facilities are available. RNTU Bhopal provides good infrastructure with smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, good labs, and a rich library for students.

reviews.review_heading: I would like to suggest this college to every student I know for admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the hostel is also good. The security level is safe for students, but as we know, good food in the hostel is not expected. The facilities provided and hostel rooms are good, and overall RNTU is a good one.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very nice college and its facilities are very good.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of our college is very good. Hostels are very well-organised. There are several facilities for students like a gym, library, cricket or football ground, basketball court, badminton court, libraries, etc., and useful facilities are all included.

reviews.review_heading: Average university only for degrees, not for studies.
reviews.review_text: Everything is fine except for network issues. University campus provides hostel guest house, canteen, auditorium, etc. The infrastructure is very good. The main problem is that it is not in Bhopal, it is in Raise. Take admission after knowing all the details.

reviews.review_heading: Diploma in Medical Lab Technician.
reviews.review_text: Rabindranath Tagore University supports an enormous number of courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Laboratories are sanitized regularly, and the needed equipment is brought once a year. It's compulsory to wear lab coats throughout the day except during theoretical classes.

reviews.review_heading: This college offers excellence in technical education.
reviews.review_text: Avar University insists on a specific set of objectives to follow on campus for maintaining college decorum. Individual office rooms are arranged for placement offices, administrative offices, HODs, and PT incharges. Health care unit is also arranged for students' concerns.

reviews.review_heading: Consistent technical education.
reviews.review_text: Students get access to medical emergencies at any time. Classrooms are developed with needed tools. There are no sports hours in our schedule. Sometimes, canteens are very crowded. The hostel provides food at a specific time.

reviews.review_heading: A mini short college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good, you can directly compare it with world-class infrastructure. The classrooms are very systematic and clean, and you will never be disappointed in terms of cleanliness and peacefulness. I think Wi-Fi will never work here, even if you have the password.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, environment, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: RNTU is the number 1 college in Bhopal city, so the infrastructure is very classic and attractive. We have good Wi-Fi connectivity. The campus has a good environment. There are high classrooms and a lab. Classrooms have good surroundings. Good facilities are provided. They have value for money. Overall, the hostel facility is good.

reviews.review_heading: One of the good private colleges in Bhopal.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure in our college is nice.
There is a Wi-Fi facility available with high speed.
A decent library is there, as is a big computer lab with at least 200 systems.
Hostel is available for both Boys and Girls.
Gym facilities are also available in the hostel.
Mess food is above average.(Non-veg not allowed).
Fantastic canteen is there.
Sports and games facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Rabindranath Tagore University is the best in itself for placements.
reviews.review_text: RNTU hostels offer excellent facilities in the rooms, including daily cleaning, food, and Wi-Fi. Overall, the amenities provided by Rabindranath Tagore University are great, and I am thankful for all the support from the teachers, mentors, and principal.

reviews.review_text: The campus is good with neat classrooms, highly infrastructured buildings with all the facilities. All the students behave themselves to maintain the decorum of our college. There is a big spacious library, an open auditorium, and good transportation facilities available within the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rabindranath Tagore University.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members and the infrastructure are totally fine. The faculty is very friendly with the students; they are flexible with them. The way of teaching is absolutely fine, and the infrastructure is really good, with all the facilities available in our course.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are available at Rabindranath Tagore University. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteens, classrooms, etc. facilities are available at this college. Hostel facilities at this college were also available for the students. The food available for students in the hostel was also good to eat.

faqs.answer: A:    A significant number of applicants compete for a limited number of seats in government medical colleges under the All India quota based on NEET exam, making admission extremely competitive.For General AI category, the cutoffs are substantially higher than the cutoff for other All India quota seats. A considerably higher score—often in the range of 650–700 or more out of 720—is typically needed to be eligible for a place in a government medical college through the All India quota.A candidate who scores only 2–4 marks above the cutoff is likely to enter a highly competitive zone where their prospects of getting an All India quota seat are unpredictable and dependent on a number of variables, including the distribution of their overall score and the number of seats available.The number of candidates taking the NEET exam has a direct effect on the cut-off as well. A big candidate pool raises the level of competition and could result in higher cutoffs. The cut-off scores are impacted by the number of seats available in medical colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Dentistry students can earn lots of money.

review_content.Placements: From the 100 student batch, about 72% of students passed in the first attempt, so they get a job as dental surgeons assistance at a private clinic with an average salary of Rs. 21,000 per month. Some students earn up to Rs. 35,000 per month based on their clinic knowledge. After completion of graduation, you get a chance of giving the exam for a government job with a monthly salary of Rs. 75,000, but there are limited seats only as there is high competition. Various high-level companies like Tata and Reliance also recruit dental surgeons for their employees with a salary package of approximately 5 LPA, but there is high competition with limited seats, so there is a good scope.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best colleges in India.

review_content.Placements: It is a professional course. Our college doesn't provide placements. We can open a clinic. However, GDCRI passed-out students have been employed in various places. Additionally, after completing their fourth year, they must complete a one-year paid internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. We have a digital library and preclinical labs. Classrooms are not very good. The hostel is good. The food served in the hostel is good. They serve vegetarian and non-vegetarian food items.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. We have a digital library and preclinical labs. Classrooms are not very good. The hostel is good. The food served in the hostel is good. They serve vegetarian and non-vegetarian food items.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college, and I am proud to be a part of it.

review_content.Placements: Students with higher NEET scores are admitted to our college. The highest salary offered is between Rs. 300,000 per month and Rs. 400,000 per month. The minimum salary offered is Rs. 100000 in government hospitals. Top roles offered are teachers, professors, and doctors in their respective specialisations.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our classrooms include desks, benches, fans, air conditioning, digital boards, and blackboards. There are a variety of books by different authors for study purposes. The lab is well organised.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful, kind, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching is excellent. The course curriculum is relevant. This makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are difficult because the syllabus is very vast and difficult. Our teacher makes it easy for us.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Very satisfied in case of infrastructure, placement, facilities and academics but not in case of fee

review_content.Placements: All the students after completing internship in the same hospital can setup their own clinic on the basis of their MBBS degree or can apply for NEET - PG exam for further specialisation. Minimum 9.5 to 10 L per year package after graduating with internship in the same college.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are equipped with ACs with availability of Projector and Best Quality sound system. One classroom has the capacity to acquire 200 students at once. Central library is located in the campus only which is a 3 floor building with all the essential resources like books, e-library and hygienic conditions are well maintained. Boys and girls have separate hostels of 4 floors each and each room contains 3 students for living and each room has separate attached toilet and bathroom which is super comfortable and the hygiene is well maintained. 4-5 Events along with games and sports competitions occur every year.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty members and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: As my course is MBBS, we get a starting salary of at least Rs. 60,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are various government and private hospitals. If we study for 4 years, we get selected for post-graduate courses, then we get more salaries.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. The campus is very big with a 10-floor hospital building, a 6-floor college building, separate buildings for OPD, separate buildings for the OBGY department, separate boys and girls hostels, a gymnasium, indoor sports, mess, and a playground.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: All students are placed. We get a starting salary of at least 60,000 per month. If you get a PG seat after completing MBBS, then you get higher salaries. Internships are provided by the college itself. The highest package is 1.5 Lacs per month. Many roles like MO are offered.
content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure with a six-story college building, a ten-story hospital building, separate buildings for the OPD and Obstetrics and Gynaecology department, separate boys' and girls' hostels, a gymnasium facility, a football ground and basketball court, an area for indoor sports like table tennis and carrom, and a separate library.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with everything that the college has.

content.Placements: There are no placements for doctors. However, you will surely get appointed as a medical officer in any government hospital, and the private hospitals also hire you with a huge salary. Every student gets a job as soon as they pass out and complete 365 days of internship. So there is no need to worry, and even we can start our own clinics.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is way very good here. There is a library, 200 bedded hospital with all technical equipment, 6-7 huge ceremony halls and huge lecture halls with an accommodation capacity of 200-250 students. There are well-equipped labs, classrooms and demo rooms. The hostel has a gym, TV, gas stove, etc. The quality of the mess is also quite good.

highlights.summary: SNS College of Allied Health Science admissions are open. Interested candidates can fill out the admission enquiry form on the college's website for more details.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programme offered at SNS College of Allied Health Science is BSc. This course is offered across specialisations, including Operation Theatre and Anaesthesia Technology, Cardiac Technology, Radiography and Imaging Technology and Cardio Pulmonary Perfusion Care Technology, among others.
For BSc admission, students must have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Botany or Zoology and English with at least 45% aggregate (35% aggregate for SC/ ST candidates). Students can check the popular programmes offered at SNS College of Allied Health Science in the table provided below:

placements.overview: SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences offers placement assistance to students. The college also help students with the internship opportunities. Some of the hospitals which have recruited students from this college are as follows:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences, SNS Group of Institutions offers a wide range of programmes at UG level. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG stage, courses available include B.Sc.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, a candidate should have complete the age of 17 years at the time of admission to apply for BSc course at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences. Aspirants who would complete the said age on or before December 31 of the year of admission can also apply for the BSc programme.
faqs.question: Is there any age limit to apply for BSc at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Physician Assistant - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and the future is good in this college.

review_content.Placements: Final year students will be eligible for campus placement in SG Gastro Care, Nalam Hospital, KG Hospital, etc. There are more than 10 opportunities in each hospital. 60,000 per year is the average package of the hospital. Ninety percent of students get placement. Getting placement is the plan after getting placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi is available for all students. Labs are available, classrooms are very neat and clean. There is a well-educated faculty on campus with eligibility being a master's degree. Good food is available in the canteen, and there is a free clinic available on campus. Sports and games are very special on the campus.

faqs.answer: SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences considers the scores of the candidates in the last qualifying exam for admission. Candidates with a valid CET or NEET score can also get admission. However, it is not mandatory to have a valid entrance exam score. Once selected, aspirants are further called for document verification. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get a seat in SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences?

faqs.answer: Admission to SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences is merit-based. The college considers Class 12 scores of the candidates for admission. However, aspirants with CET or NEET score can also apply for admission at SNS BSc programme. Once the selection process is over, candidates are further called for document verification and fee payment.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences?

faqs.answer: Yes, a candidate should have complete the age of 17 years at the time of admission to apply for BSc course at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences. Aspirants who would complete the said age on or before December 31 of the year of admission can also apply for the BSc programme.
faqs.question: Q: Is there any age limit to apply for BSc at SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences?

faqs.answer: SNS College of Allied and Health Sciences offers a four-year BSc course with one-year internship at the UG level. admission_process.title: University of Technology Jaipur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: University of Technology Jaipur admissionis both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, GATE, etc. for admission to specific courses. UOT offers over 60 UG, PG, and doctoral courses through six schools/ departments. Apart from the degree courses,UOT Jaipuralso offers several diploma courses. The mode of application at the university is online or offline for all courses.

University of Technology offers courses in multiple streams such as Management, Law, Science, Arts etc. The university offers courses in full-time offline mode. Aspirants can fill out the form online or download the same to apply for the preferred course. Candidates can check below the keyUOT admissionhighlights:
Particulars
UOT Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
How to apply?
https://www.universityoftechnology.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Admission to the UOT programmes is both merit and entrance-based. Candidates need to meet the eligibility requirements specified for their preferred course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility and selection criteria for the topUOT Jaipur courses:
Note:In the absence of information, I have taken the selection criteria from unofficial sources. Hence, data might vary.

University of Technology Jaipur admission criteriamay vary from course to course. Aspirants should check the course-specific eligibility requirements before filling out the application form. Admission to the offered courses is based on qualifying exam or entrance exam scores. Each of the stages of the admission process is explained below:
STEP 1: UOT Jaipur Application Process 2025

The eligible students can visit the official website (https://www.universityoftechnology.edu.in/) to register and fill out the admission form. Aspirants are required to pay an application fee to register for a course at UOT.
STEP 2: Shortlisting of Students

After the conclusion of the application process, candidates are shortlisted either based on merit in the last qualifying examination or the accepted entrance exam. For Professional/ Technical Courses, aspirants need to pass an entrance test and would be selected for the course only if they fulfil the merit requirements.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the candidates are informed about their selection, they need to come for document verification. Selected candidates can further visit the university campus to pay theUOT Jaipur fee.

courses_data.name: University of Technology Jaipur MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, CAT, CBSE 12th, ISC, RBSE 12th
courses_data.description: University of Technology MBA course is offered through the School of Commerce and Management for two-years. Candidates need to pass a bachelor's degree of a minimum three-year duration with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category candidates) to apply for the UOT MBA course. Admission to the MBA programme is based on national-level Management entrance exams.

faqs.question: Is University of Technology MBA admission entrance-based?
faqs.answer: UOT Jaipur accepts national-level examination such asCAT/MAT/XAT/CMAT/ATMAfor MBA admission. Candidates with a valid score in any of these examinations can apply. Apart from this, it is crucial that the aspirant fuflilf the course-specific eligibility criteria. Candidates need to complete a minimum of three-year bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for University of Technology MBA.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at University of Technology in an MBA programme?
faqs.answer: University of Technology acceptsCAT/ MAT/ XAT/ CMAT/ ATMAscore for MBA admission. Before applying for admission, aspirant should check whether he/she is eligible for admission or not. The minimum eligibility requirement is three-year bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved categories) for MBA.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBA at University of Technology Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed a bachelor's degree of minimum three-year duration with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category candidates) are eligible to apply for the MBA course at University of Technology Jaipur. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: How costly is University of Technology?
faqs.answer: University of Technology Jaipur feeis kept quite affordable. The fee is exclusive of the transportation charges, hostel fee, and various other charges. If the students find the fee costly, there are scholarships available for students. Some of the University of Technology fee details are mentioned below:CoursesTuition FeesB.E. / B.Tech2.7 L - 4.5 LMBA/PGDM1.8 L - 4.5 LB.Sc.60 K - 3 L

courses_data.name: University of Technology Jaipur BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: University of Technology offers a four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech in various specialisations such as Mechanical,Electrical, Civil andComputer Science Engineering. Besides, the university also offers lateral entry to the BTech course. Candidates must complete Class 12 with Physics/ Chemistry/ Mathematics/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ IT/ Biology/ Information Practices/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational Subject/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship with at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category candidates) in the three subjects taken together to apply for BTech programme.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at University of Technology Jaipur?
faqs.answer: University of Technology Jaipur offers BTech four-years at the UG level. The programme is spread across eight semesters and is available in four specialisations. Candidates after completing Class 12 in relevant subjects can apply for any of the below-mentioned BTech specialisations:Mechanical EngineeringElectrical EngineeringCivil EngineeringComputer Science Engineering

faqs.question: Is entrance exam accepted for admission to University of Technology BTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, University of Technology, Jaipur accepts national-level entrance exams such asJEE Main for admission to BTech course. Aspirants must have a valid entrance exam scorecard to apply for BTech admission. Besides, candidates also need to complete Class 12 in relevant subjects with at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category candidates) in the three subjects taken together to apply for BTech.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech admission at University of Technology, Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 12 with Physics/Chemistry/ Mathematics/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ IT/Biology/ Information Practices/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational Subject/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship with at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category candidates) in the three subjects taken together to apply for BTech programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

courses_data.name: University of Technology Jaipur MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: University of Technology offers a regularMaster of Technology (MTech)programme in a full-time mode. The duration of the programme is two years. The university offers MTech in Computer Science, Civil, Mechanical, Electrical and Electronics Engineering. The university shortlists candidates for MTech based onGATEscore. Besides, aspirants must complete graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for the UOT MTech programme.

faqs.question: Is M.Tech available at University of Technology?
faqs.answer: University of Technology offers two-year M.Tech course divided into four semesters. The university offers MTech in Computer Science, Civil, Mechanical, Electrical and Electronics Engineering. The university shortlists candidates for M.Tech based onGATEscore. Besides, aspirants must complete graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for UOT M.Tech programme.

faqs.question: What is the minimum educational qualification required for University of Technology MTech admission?
faqs.answer: Candidates should have passed a bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category candidates) to apply for University of Technology MTech. Aspirants should have all the relevant documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, candidates must also pass GATE exam for admission to MTech.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for M.Tech at University of Technology Jaipur?
faqs.answer: The total annual fee for University of Technology Jaipur M.Tech course isINR 1.80 lakh. Candidates need to pay INR 90,000 per year for the course. Aspirants need to deposit a part of the fee amount at the time of admission to confirm their seat. Candidates are advised to keep the fee payment receipt with them for any future reference.

faqs.answer: Candidates are selected either based on merit in the last qualifying examination or the accepted entrance exam. Aspirants who are selected have to further report at the campus for document verification and fee payment to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at University of Technology Jaipur?
faqs.answer: University of Technology admission to UG and PG courses is based on merit or entrance exam scores. For Professional/ Technical Courses, aspirants need to pass an entrance exam and would be selected for the course only if they fulfil the merit requirements. Once selected, aspirants are required to report at the campus for document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: Does University of Technology accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: Yes, University of Technology accepts JEE Main score for admission to BTech course. Joint Entrance Examination (Main), popularly called JEE Main, is the exam conducted by NTA. Besides, aspirants are also required to meet the educational requirements to apply for UOT Jaipur BTech. Aspirants must complete Class 12 with relevant subjects to get admission in the BTech course.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to the BTech course at University of Technology Jaipur?
faqs.answer: University of Technology Jaipur BTech course admissions are based on theJEE Mainscores. Candidates willing to get admission must first register for the entrance exam. Then appear for the entrance exam. Then with valid scores apply on the official website of the university.

placement_data.title: University of Technology Jaipur Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The University has a highly functional career and placement cell that contributes towards the selection and placement of students in reputed organizations. The cell has committed to 100,000+ placements to date with over 400 companies taking part in it.

The University has released the placement report for the year 2024 for BTech , MTech , MBA , and other courses. A total of 435 students were placed during the 2024 drive. The highest package offered was INR 4.80 LPA, and the lowest package stood at INR 2 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: Over College University of Technology is the best college and University.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has spacious, well ventilated Laboratories. High speed Wi-Fi was available. A central library with a large collection of textbooks, reference books, and journals online/offline. Hostels have adequate facilities with shared/separate rooms depending on the type. Basic amenities like study tables, fans, and cupboards were provided. Regular cleaning and maintenance, though comfort may vary depending on occupancy. The mess provides a fixed menu with nutritious meals. On Campus Health facil...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the education and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities available for B.Com students, like well-maintained libraries, well-maintained classrooms, etc. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good quality. Also, we have good medical facilities for B.Com students.

reviews.review_heading: UOT Jaipur offers a spacious campus with supportive faculty and decent facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and well-equipped laboratories. There are large grounds and sports complexes for the students to play sports like cricket, football, and basketball. Students here have access to AC and non-AC rooms to choose from.

reviews.review_heading: My university campus tour.
reviews.review_text: The university offers good campus facilities, and there are well-educated and experienced teachers according to the course. There is also hostel accommodation available with good quality food in the mess and canteen, along with other necessary facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our campus environment was very good. All facilities like Wi-Fi, the laboratory, and RO were available. The food served in the mess was good. Attached washrooms were available in the hostel. All facilities were available at our college. Warden was very good. All sports equipment was available. Basketball and football courts were available. A cricket ground was also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our university is established in the year 2017.
reviews.review_text: Our institution provides all the facilities like Wi-Fi, a lab, good classrooms and a library. Everything is good here.
